model_requirements.description: consumer goods industry enterprise data model.

_vibe_session_metadata.summary: Model quality: 96.4/100 (6 warnings, 1 errors). 99 tables across 9 domains.

model.name: Consumer_Goods
model.description: consumer goods industry enterprise data model.

domains.name: product
domains.description: Single source of truth for all product master data across the CPG/FMCG portfolio. Owns SKU definitions, GTIN/UPC/EAN identifiers, product hierarchies, BOM structures, PLM lifecycle stages, formulation records, packaging specifications, INCI ingredient declarations, and regulatory labeling attributes. Serves as the authoritative product catalog referenced by all other domains.

domains.name: manufacturing
domains.description: Owns production planning, scheduling, and execution across manufacturing facilities. Manages production orders, batch records, work orders, MES integration (Siemens Opcenter), line performance (OEE), yield tracking, MRP runs, GMP compliance events, changeover management, and shop floor data collection aligned with ISO 22716 standards.

products.name: manufacturing_facility
products.description: Physical manufacturing plant or factory where products are produced. SSOT owner for production facility master. Distinct from distribution_facility which represents warehouses/DCs.

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the manufacturing facility. Primary key. Role: MASTER_RESOURCE.

attributes.name: company_code_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Each manufacturing facility belongs to a legal entity (company code) for statutory reporting, intercompany accounting, and tax filings. Multi-entity consumer goods groups require this link to determin

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Consumer goods plants map to profit centers for plant-level P&L and segment reporting (IFRS 8). Standard SAP configuration assigns each manufacturing facility to a profit center; required for contribu

attributes.name: supply_network_node_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.network_node. Business justification: Required for Supply Network Planning report to map each plant to its network node, enabling ATP, capacity, and logistics calculations; domain experts expect this mapping.

attributes.name: address_line_1
attributes.description: Primary street address line for the manufacturing facility location. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: address_line_2
attributes.description: Secondary address line for suite, building, or additional location details. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality where the manufacturing facility is located.

attributes.name: commissioning_date
attributes.description: Date when the facility was officially commissioned and began production operations.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code where the manufacturing facility is located (e.g., USA, DEU, CHN).

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the manufacturing facility record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: email_address
attributes.description: Primary email contact for the manufacturing facility operations team. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: energy_consumption_kwh_per_year
attributes.description: Annual energy consumption of the facility measured in kilowatt-hours, used for sustainability reporting and cost management.

attributes.name: epa_site_number
attributes.description: EPA facility identifier for environmental compliance tracking and reporting under EPA regulations.

attributes.name: erp_plant_code
attributes.description: Plant identifier in the SAP S/4HANA ERP system used for integration with MM, PP, SD, and WM modules.

attributes.name: facility_name
attributes.description: Official business name of the manufacturing facility or plant site.

attributes.name: facility_type
attributes.description: Classification of the manufacturing facility based on primary production function: mixing (formulation), filling (liquid/semi-solid), packaging (secondary), co-manufacturing (third-party), integrated (end-to-end), or contract (toll manufacturing).

attributes.name: fda_establishment_number
attributes.business_glossary_term: Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Establishment ID
attributes.description: FDA-issued establishment identifier for facilities manufacturing FDA-regulated products (cosmetics, OTC drugs, food). Required for US market distribution.

tag_set.value: Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Establishment ID

attributes.name: gmp_certification_date
attributes.description: Date when the facility received its current GMP certification.

attributes.name: gmp_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility holds current Good Manufacturing Practice certification required for consumer goods production.

attributes.name: gmp_expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when the current GMP certification expires and requires renewal.

attributes.name: iso_14001_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility holds ISO 14001 Environmental Management System certification.

attributes.name: iso_22716_compliance_tier
attributes.description: Internal classification of the facility's compliance level with ISO 22716 cosmetics GMP standards: tier_1 (full compliance), tier_2 (partial compliance), tier_3 (basic compliance), non_compliant.

attributes.name: iso_9001_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility holds ISO 9001 Quality Management System certification.

attributes.name: last_audit_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent quality or compliance audit conducted at the facility.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the manufacturing facility record was last updated in the system.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the facility location in decimal degrees for mapping and logistics optimization.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the facility location in decimal degrees for mapping and logistics optimization.

attributes.name: mes_system_integrated
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility is integrated with Siemens Opcenter MES for real-time production tracking and shop floor data collection.

attributes.name: next_audit_date
attributes.description: Scheduled date for the next quality or compliance audit at the facility.

attributes.name: number_of_production_lines
attributes.description: Total count of active production lines within the facility available for manufacturing operations.

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current operational state of the manufacturing facility in its lifecycle.

attributes.name: osha_establishment_number
attributes.business_glossary_term: Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) Establishment Number
attributes.description: OSHA establishment identifier for workplace safety reporting and compliance tracking.

tag_set.value: Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) Establishment Number

attributes.name: ownership_type
attributes.description: Legal ownership structure of the facility: owned (company-owned), leased (long-term lease), contract (third-party operated), joint_venture (shared ownership).

attributes.name: phone_number
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number for the manufacturing facility. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: plant_code
attributes.description: Unique business identifier for the manufacturing plant used across SAP S/4HANA PP module and operational systems. Typically 4-10 alphanumeric characters.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the facility address. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: production_capacity_units_per_day
attributes.description: Maximum daily production capacity of the facility measured in finished goods units per day under normal operating conditions.

attributes.name: shift_pattern
attributes.description: Standard operating shift pattern for the facility: single (8 hours), two_shift (16 hours), three_shift (24 hours), continuous (24/7), flexible (variable).

attributes.name: square_footage
attributes.description: Total floor area of the manufacturing facility in square feet, including production, warehouse, and administrative spaces.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or regional administrative division where the facility is located.

attributes.name: sustainability_rating
attributes.description: Internal sustainability performance rating for the facility based on environmental impact, energy efficiency, waste reduction, and sustainable sourcing practices.

attributes.name: time_zone
attributes.description: IANA time zone identifier for the facility location (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/Berlin) used for production scheduling and shift planning.

attributes.name: water_consumption_cubic_meters_per_year
attributes.description: Annual water consumption of the facility measured in cubic meters, tracked for environmental compliance and sustainability reporting.

attributes.name: workforce_headcount
attributes.description: Total number of employees (full-time equivalent) assigned to the manufacturing facility.

products.name: production_line
products.description: Master record for each physical production line within a manufacturing facility. Captures line code, line name, facility reference, line type (filling, blending, packaging, assembly), design speed (units/hour), nominal OEE target, GMP classification, MES asset tag (Siemens Opcenter), changeover time standard (minutes), and current operational status. Enables OEE benchmarking, scheduling capacity allocation, and MES integration at the line level.
products.reference: Siemens Opcenter MES — Work Center / Resource Master

attributes.name: production_line_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the production line. Primary key for the production line master record.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: FK to finance.cost_center

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_facility. Business justification: Production line belongs to a specific manufacturing facility; replace generic facility reference with direct link to manufacturing_facility.

attributes.name: product_category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.product_category. Business justification: Production lines are dedicated to specific product categories. The existing plain-text 'product_category_capability' column is a denormalization of product_category. Normalizing enables category-level

attributes.name: allergen_handling_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this production line handles products containing allergens. Critical for cross-contamination prevention and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: allergen_types
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of allergen types handled on this line (e.g., nuts, dairy, gluten). Used for allergen management and cleaning validation protocols.

attributes.name: asset_tag_number
attributes.description: Physical asset tag number assigned to the production line for asset management and tracking purposes. Links to the fixed asset register in the ERP system.

attributes.name: automation_level
attributes.description: Degree of automation on the production line. Indicates the level of human intervention required and impacts labor planning and quality consistency.

attributes.name: changeover_time_standard_minutes
attributes.description: Standard time in minutes required to change over the production line from one product or batch to another. Used for production scheduling and OEE loss calculation.

attributes.name: cleaning_validation_protocol
attributes.description: Reference to the cleaning validation protocol document applicable to this production line. Ensures GMP compliance and prevents cross-contamination.

attributes.name: commissioning_date
attributes.description: Date when the production line was commissioned and became operational. Used for asset lifecycle tracking and depreciation calculations.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this production line record was first created in the system. Used for data lineage and audit trail purposes.

attributes.name: crew_size_standard
attributes.description: Standard number of operators required to run the production line at full capacity. Used for labor planning and cost allocation.

attributes.name: depreciation_method
attributes.description: Accounting depreciation method applied to this production line asset. Used for financial reporting and asset valuation.

attributes.name: design_speed_units_per_hour
attributes.description: Theoretical maximum production capacity of the line measured in units per hour under ideal conditions. Used for capacity planning and scheduling.

attributes.name: energy_consumption_kwh_per_unit
attributes.description: Average energy consumption per unit produced on this line, measured in kilowatt-hours. Key metric for sustainability reporting and cost analysis.

attributes.name: environmental_control_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether the production line requires controlled environmental conditions such as temperature, humidity, or air quality. Critical for GMP compliance and product quality.

attributes.name: gmp_classification
attributes.description: GMP classification level of the production line indicating the quality and cleanliness standards required for products manufactured on this line. Critical for regulatory compliance and product safety.

attributes.name: humidity_range_percent
attributes.description: Acceptable relative humidity range for the production line as a percentage. Format: min-max (e.g., 40-60). Used for environmental monitoring and compliance.

attributes.name: installed_power_kw
attributes.description: Total installed electrical power capacity of the production line in kilowatts. Used for energy consumption tracking and sustainability reporting.

attributes.name: last_major_overhaul_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent major overhaul or refurbishment of the production line. Used for maintenance planning and asset condition assessment.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this production line record was last updated. Used for change tracking and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: line_code
attributes.description: Business identifier code for the production line. Unique within the facility and used for operational reference in MES systems and production scheduling.

attributes.name: line_length_meters
attributes.description: Physical length of the production line in meters. Used for facility layout planning and material flow analysis.

attributes.name: line_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the production line. Used for display in dashboards, reports, and operator interfaces.

attributes.name: line_type
attributes.description: Classification of the production line based on its primary manufacturing function. Determines the type of operations and products that can be processed on this line.

attributes.name: mean_time_between_failures_hours
attributes.description: Average time in hours between equipment failures on this production line. Key reliability metric used for maintenance optimization and capacity planning.

attributes.name: mean_time_to_repair_hours
attributes.description: Average time in hours required to repair and restore the production line to operational status after a failure. Used for downtime analysis and maintenance resource planning.

attributes.name: mes_asset_tag
attributes.description: Unique asset identifier for this production line in the Siemens Opcenter MES system. Used for real-time data collection, production tracking, and integration with shop floor systems.

attributes.name: modified_by_user
attributes.description: User identifier of the person who last modified this production line record. Used for audit trail and accountability.

attributes.name: next_scheduled_maintenance_date
attributes.description: Date of the next planned preventive maintenance activity for this production line. Used for maintenance scheduling and production planning coordination.

attributes.name: nominal_oee_target_percent
attributes.business_glossary_term: Nominal Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) Target Percent
attributes.description: Target OEE percentage for this production line. OEE is calculated as Availability × Performance × Quality and represents the benchmark for line performance evaluation.

tag_set.value: Nominal Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) Target Percent

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional notes, special instructions, or operational considerations specific to this production line.

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the production line. Indicates whether the line is available for production scheduling and execution.

attributes.name: plc_system_type
attributes.description: Type and model of the PLC system controlling the production line. Used for technical support, integration planning, and system upgrade management.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_frequency
attributes.description: Standard frequency for quality control inspections on this production line. Defines the QC sampling plan and compliance with GMP requirements.

attributes.name: record_source_system
attributes.description: Source system from which this production line record originated (e.g., SAP S/4HANA PP, Siemens Opcenter MES). Used for data lineage and integration troubleshooting.

attributes.name: scada_integration_enabled
attributes.business_glossary_term: Supervisory Control And Data Acquisition (SCADA) Integration Enabled
attributes.description: Indicates whether the production line is integrated with the SCADA system for real-time monitoring and control. Enables remote visibility and data collection.

tag_set.value: Supervisory Control And Data Acquisition (SCADA) Integration Enabled

attributes.name: scrap_rate_target_percent
attributes.description: Target scrap rate percentage for this production line. Used for quality performance benchmarking and waste reduction initiatives.

attributes.name: shift_pattern
attributes.description: Standard operating shift pattern for this production line. Defines the daily operating schedule and impacts capacity calculations.

attributes.name: temperature_range_celsius
attributes.description: Acceptable operating temperature range for the production line in Celsius. Format: min-max (e.g., 18-25). Used for environmental monitoring and compliance.

attributes.name: useful_life_years
attributes.description: Expected useful life of the production line in years for depreciation and asset lifecycle planning purposes.

products.name: work_center
products.description: Master record for individual work centers (machines, stations, cells) within a production line. Captures work center code, description, work center type (mixing vessel, filling machine, labeler, capper, palletizer), rated capacity, standard cycle time, maintenance class, MES equipment ID (Siemens Opcenter), GMP equipment qualification status (IQ/OQ/PQ), and calibration due date. Supports MRP capacity planning, scheduling, and equipment qualification tracking per ISO 22716.
products.reference: SAP S/4HANA PP Work Center / Siemens Opcenter Equipment Master

attributes.name: work_center_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the work center. Primary key.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Labor and overhead budgeting links each work center to a finance cost center for expense tracking.

attributes.name: inspection_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_plan. Business justification: Inspection plans in consumer goods GMP are scoped to specific work centers (e.g., filling line IPC, checkweigher AQL). Linking work_center to inspection_plan enables work-center-specific quality plann

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Reference to the manufacturing plant where this work center is physically located.

attributes.name: product_category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.product_category. Business justification: Work centers specialize in specific product categories (e.g., liquid fill, powder blending). The existing plain-text 'product_category_capability' column is a denormalization of product_category. Norm

attributes.name: production_line_id
attributes.description: Reference to the production line to which this work center belongs, enabling line-level capacity and performance analysis.

attributes.name: available_capacity_hours_per_day
attributes.description: Total available production hours per day for this work center after accounting for planned downtime, breaks, and maintenance windows.

attributes.name: calibration_due_date
attributes.description: Next scheduled calibration date for measurement and control instruments on this work center, ensuring accuracy and compliance with quality standards.

attributes.name: capacity_unit
attributes.description: Unit of measure for the rated capacity indicating how production output is quantified for this work center.

attributes.name: category
attributes.description: High-level category grouping work centers by operational domain for capacity planning and resource allocation.

attributes.name: clean_room_class
attributes.description: ISO 14644 clean room classification for work centers in controlled environments, critical for cosmetics and personal care product manufacturing per GMP requirements. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: iso_3|iso_4|iso_5|iso_6|iso_7|iso_8|not_applicable — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: code
attributes.description: Business identifier code for the work center used in production planning and scheduling systems. Externally known unique code.

attributes.name: commissioning_date
attributes.description: Date when the work center was first commissioned and put into production service, establishing the asset lifecycle baseline.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this work center record was first created in the system, supporting audit trail and data lineage.

attributes.name: crew_size
attributes.description: Standard number of operators required to run this work center during normal production operations, used for labor planning and scheduling.

attributes.name: decommissioning_date
attributes.description: Date when the work center was retired from production service, supporting asset lifecycle tracking and capacity planning.

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Detailed description of the work center including its purpose, capabilities, and operational characteristics.

attributes.name: energy_consumption_kwh_per_hour
attributes.description: Average energy consumption in kilowatt-hours per operating hour, supporting sustainability reporting and cost allocation per ISO 14001 environmental management.

attributes.name: gmp_qualification_status
attributes.description: Current qualification status of the work center per GMP requirements. IQ (Installation Qualification), OQ (Operational Qualification), PQ (Performance Qualification) track equipment validation stages per ISO 22716.

attributes.name: hazardous_area_classification
attributes.description: Electrical area classification for work centers handling flammable or explosive materials, ensuring compliance with Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) and ATEX directives. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: non_hazardous|class_1_div_1|class_1_div_2|class_2_div_1|class_2_div_2|atex_zone_0|atex_zone_1|atex_zone_2 — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: humidity_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this work center operates in a humidity-controlled environment requiring environmental monitoring per GMP standards.

attributes.name: last_calibration_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent calibration performed on this work center, supporting traceability and compliance documentation.

attributes.name: maintenance_class
attributes.description: Classification of the work center by maintenance priority and frequency requirements, driving preventive maintenance scheduling.

attributes.name: maintenance_strategy
attributes.description: Maintenance approach applied to this work center defining how maintenance activities are planned and executed.

attributes.name: manufacturer_name
attributes.description: Name of the equipment manufacturer, supporting warranty management, spare parts procurement, and technical support.

attributes.name: mes_equipment_code
attributes.description: Unique equipment identifier in the Siemens Opcenter MES system enabling real-time production tracking and shop floor data collection.

attributes.name: model_number
attributes.description: Manufacturer model number of the work center equipment, enabling precise identification for maintenance, parts ordering, and technical documentation.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this work center record was last modified, supporting change tracking and audit compliance.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the work center for identification and reporting purposes.

attributes.name: operator_skill_level_required
attributes.description: Minimum operator skill level required to operate this work center safely and effectively, supporting workforce planning and training requirements.

attributes.name: qualification_date
attributes.description: Date when the work center achieved its current GMP qualification status, establishing the baseline for requalification scheduling.

attributes.name: rated_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum production capacity of the work center expressed in units per time period, used for Material Requirements Planning (MRP) capacity calculations.

attributes.name: requalification_due_date
attributes.description: Date by which the work center must undergo requalification to maintain GMP compliance and production authorization.

attributes.name: safety_certification
attributes.description: Safety certifications held by this work center such as CE marking, UL listing, or other regulatory approvals required for operation.

attributes.name: serial_number
attributes.description: Unique serial number assigned by the manufacturer to this specific equipment unit, supporting warranty tracking and asset identification.

attributes.name: setup_time_minutes
attributes.description: Standard time in minutes required to prepare the work center for production, including changeover and configuration activities.

attributes.name: shift_pattern
attributes.description: Standard shift pattern for this work center defining operational hours and crew rotation schedules.

attributes.name: standard_cycle_time_minutes
attributes.description: Standard time in minutes required to complete one production cycle or unit at this work center, used for scheduling and costing.

attributes.name: teardown_time_minutes
attributes.description: Standard time in minutes required to clean, sanitize, and reset the work center after production completion per Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) requirements.

attributes.name: temperature_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this work center operates in a temperature-controlled environment requiring environmental monitoring per GMP standards.

attributes.name: utilization_rate_percent
attributes.description: Target utilization rate as a percentage of available capacity, used for capacity planning and Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) benchmarking.

attributes.name: work_center_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the work center indicating availability for production scheduling and capacity planning.

attributes.name: work_center_type
attributes.description: Classification of the work center by its primary function in the manufacturing process. Categorizes equipment by operational role.

products.name: manufacturing_bom
products.description: Bill of Materials master record (header + component lines) defining the complete material structure for each finished good or semi-finished SKU. Header captures BOM number, BOM type (production, co-product, phantom), base quantity, unit of measure, validity dates, PLM system reference, and BOM status. Component lines capture item number, material reference (raw material, packaging, semi-finished), component quantity per base quantity, scrap factor percentage, item category (stock, non-stock, phantom), INCI name for cosmetic ingredients, allergen flag, hazardous material flag, and component validity dates. SSOT for MRP explosion, production order material requirements, COGS calculation, and regulatory ingredient disclosure per FDA/EU REACH. This is the single authoritative source for all BOM component data — no separate component entity exists.
products.reference: SAP S/4HANA PP — Bill of Materials (CS01/CS02)

attributes.name: manufacturing_bom_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the bill of materials record. Primary key for the manufacturing BOM entity.

attributes.name: primary_manufacturing_sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the finished good or semi-finished SKU that this BOM defines. Links to the product master for which this material structure applies.

attributes.name: specification_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.specification. Business justification: Manufacturing BOMs reference quality specifications for components (raw materials, packaging). The manufacturing_bom.regulatory_compliance_notes and inci_name attributes indicate spec-level compliance

attributes.name: allergen_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component contains or may contain allergens as defined by FDA and EU REACH regulations. True if allergen present. Used for product labeling, consumer safety warnings, and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: alternative_item_group
attributes.description: Identifier for a group of interchangeable components that can substitute for each other in production. Used for supply chain flexibility, multi-sourcing strategies, and material availability optimization.

attributes.name: alternative_item_priority
attributes.description: The selection priority for this component within its alternative item group. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used by MRP to determine preferred material selection when multiple alternatives are available.

attributes.name: approval_date
attributes.description: The date when this BOM version was formally approved for production use. Establishes the official release date for regulatory compliance and change control purposes.

attributes.name: approved_by
attributes.description: The name or identifier of the person who approved this BOM version for production use. Required for GMP compliance and quality assurance. Typically a product development manager, quality manager, or regulatory affairs specialist.

attributes.name: backflush_indicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component is automatically consumed (backflushed) when the finished good is confirmed in the MES system, rather than requiring explicit material issue transactions. True if backflushed. Common for high-volume, low-value components.

attributes.name: base_quantity
attributes.description: The reference quantity of the finished good for which the component quantities are defined. Typically 1 unit, 100 units, or 1 batch. All component quantities are expressed per this base quantity.

attributes.name: base_unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit of measure for the base quantity (e.g., EA for each, KG for kilogram, L for liter, BOX for box). Must align with the SKU primary UOM.

attributes.name: bom_number
attributes.description: The externally-known unique business identifier for this BOM, typically assigned by the PLM or ERP system. Used for cross-system reference and production order material requirements.

attributes.name: bom_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the BOM. Active BOMs are used for production planning and MRP runs. Inactive or obsolete BOMs are retained for historical reference and regulatory traceability.

attributes.name: bom_type
attributes.description: Classification of the BOM structure. Production BOM is used for standard manufacturing, co-product for joint production scenarios, phantom for intermediate assemblies not stocked, engineering for R&D prototypes, and planning for demand forecasting.

attributes.name: component_effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date after which this specific component is no longer valid within the BOM structure. Nullable for open-ended components. Used for material phase-out and supplier transition management.

attributes.name: component_effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date from which this specific component becomes valid within the BOM structure. Supports phased material transitions, supplier changes, and cost optimization initiatives.

attributes.name: component_item_category
attributes.description: Classification of the component type. Stock items are inventory-managed materials, non-stock are direct procurement items, phantom are intermediate assemblies not physically stocked, text items are instructions, and variable size items have flexible dimensions.

attributes.name: component_item_number
attributes.description: Sequential line number for each component within the BOM structure. Defines the order of components for display, reporting, and regulatory ingredient listing (descending order by weight for INCI compliance).

attributes.name: component_quantity
attributes.description: The quantity of this component required to produce the base quantity of the finished good. Used for MRP explosion, production order material requirements, and COGS calculation.

attributes.name: component_unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit of measure for the component quantity (e.g., KG for raw materials, EA for packaging units, L for liquids). Must align with the component material master UOM.

attributes.name: cost_allocation_percentage
attributes.description: The percentage of total product cost attributed to this component. Used for COGS calculation, profitability analysis, and cost optimization initiatives. Sum of all component cost allocations should equal 100% for the BOM.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this BOM record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail, change tracking, and regulatory compliance documentation per ISO 9001 requirements.

attributes.name: critical_component_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component is critical for product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance. True if critical. Triggers enhanced quality control, supplier qualification requirements, and inventory safety stock policies.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date after which this BOM version is no longer valid for new production orders. Nullable for open-ended BOMs. Used for phase-out management and regulatory compliance transitions.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date from which this BOM version becomes valid for production planning and MRP explosion. Supports planned material transitions and new product launches.

attributes.name: hazardous_material_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component is classified as a hazardous material requiring special handling, storage, and disposal per OSHA and EPA regulations. True if hazardous. Triggers safety data sheet requirements and GMP compliance protocols.

attributes.name: inci_name
attributes.business_glossary_term: International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients (INCI) Name
attributes.description: The standardized INCI name for cosmetic ingredients as required by FDA and EU regulations. Used for product labeling, regulatory submissions, and consumer transparency. Mandatory for personal care and cosmetic products.

tag_set.value: International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients (INCI) Name

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this BOM record was last updated. Tracks formulation changes, component substitutions, and regulatory updates. Critical for change control and GMP compliance.

attributes.name: lead_time_days
attributes.description: The procurement or production lead time for this component in days. Used for MRP scheduling, production order release timing, and inventory planning. Includes supplier lead time plus internal processing time.

attributes.name: lot_size_requirement
attributes.description: Defines the lot sizing rule for this component in production orders. Exact requires precise quantity, minimum allows overages, multiple requires quantities in specific increments, none has no restriction. Impacts material planning and waste management.

attributes.name: minimum_lot_size
attributes.description: The minimum quantity that must be procured or produced for this component. Driven by supplier MOQ, production batch constraints, or economic order quantity calculations. Nullable if no minimum applies.

attributes.name: plm_system_reference
attributes.description: External reference identifier linking this BOM to the source PLM system record. Enables traceability to engineering change orders, formulation documents, and R&D specifications.

attributes.name: regulatory_compliance_notes
attributes.description: Free-text field capturing regulatory compliance requirements, restrictions, or special handling instructions for this component. Includes FDA registration numbers, EU REACH compliance status, GMP requirements, and safety data sheet references.

attributes.name: scrap_factor_percentage
attributes.description: The expected waste or loss percentage for this component during production. Used to adjust gross material requirements in MRP runs. Typical values range from 0% to 10% depending on material type and process complexity.

attributes.name: sustainability_certification
attributes.description: Certification or standard that this component meets for sustainable sourcing (e.g., FSC for paper, RSPO for palm oil, Fair Trade, Organic). Used for corporate sustainability reporting and consumer transparency initiatives.

attributes.name: version
attributes.description: Version identifier for the BOM structure. Incremented when material composition changes due to reformulation, cost optimization, or regulatory compliance updates. Supports change control and audit trail.

products.name: routing
products.description: Production routing master (header + operation steps) defining the complete manufacturing process sequence for a finished or semi-finished SKU. Header captures routing number, routing type (standard, reference, rate), base quantity, plant, validity dates, and total standard lead time. Operation steps capture operation number, work center assignment, standard values (setup time, machine time, labor time), control key (internal processing, external processing, milestone), yield quantity, scrap percentage, GMP critical step flag, and IPC checkpoint flag. SSOT for production scheduling, capacity planning, standard cost calculation, and GMP batch record generation per ISO 22716. This is the single authoritative source for all routing operation data — no separate operation entity exists. Aligned with SAP PP Routing master.

attributes.name: routing_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the production routing master record. Primary key.

attributes.name: inspection_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_plan. Business justification: Routings define operation sequences including IPC checkpoints (routing.ipc_checkpoint_count). Linking routing to inspection_plan associates quality inspection requirements with specific routing versio

attributes.name: manufacturing_bom_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_bom. Business justification: A production routing and a manufacturing BOM are the two core master data objects that together define how a product is manufactured — the BOM defines WHAT materials are needed, and the routing define

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the finished or semi-finished SKU that this routing defines the manufacturing process for.

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Approval status of the routing for production use. Approved routings are validated and authorized; pending routings await review; rejected routings require rework.

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this routing was approved for production use. Supports audit trail and compliance requirements.

attributes.name: base_quantity
attributes.description: Standard production lot size for which the routing operation times and resource requirements are defined. Used as the basis for scaling production schedules.

attributes.name: base_unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Unit of measure for the base quantity (e.g., KG, L, EA, M). Aligns with GS1 unit codes.

attributes.name: changeover_time_minutes
attributes.description: Time required to transition production lines from the previous product to this routing. Critical for production scheduling and minimizing downtime.

attributes.name: cost_currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the standard cost amount.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this routing record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail and data lineage.

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Detailed textual description of the routing, including its purpose, scope, and any special instructions for production planners and shop floor operators.

attributes.name: expected_scrap_percentage
attributes.description: Overall expected scrap percentage for the routing, representing anticipated waste or defects. Used for material planning and cost estimation.

attributes.name: expected_yield_percentage
attributes.description: Overall expected yield percentage for the routing, representing the ratio of good output to total input. Used for production planning and variance analysis.

attributes.name: gmp_critical_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this routing includes GMP-critical operations requiring enhanced documentation, validation, and compliance controls per ISO 22716 and FDA regulations.

attributes.name: ipc_checkpoint_count
attributes.description: Number of in-process control checkpoints defined in this routing. IPC checkpoints are quality inspection points during production per ISO 22716 and GMP requirements.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this routing record was last modified. Supports audit trail and change tracking.

attributes.name: lot_size_restriction
attributes.description: Constraint on production lot sizes for this routing. Fixed requires exact base quantity; minimum/maximum define bounds; multiple requires lot sizes to be multiples of base quantity; none allows any lot size.

attributes.name: maximum_lot_size
attributes.description: Maximum production lot size allowed for this routing. Nullable if no maximum constraint exists.

attributes.name: minimum_lot_size
attributes.description: Minimum production lot size allowed for this routing. Nullable if no minimum constraint exists.

attributes.name: operation_sequence
attributes.description: JSON array or delimited string capturing the complete sequence of operation steps. Each operation includes: operation_number, work_center_code, operation_description, control_key (internal_processing|external_processing|milestone), setup_time_minutes, machine_time_minutes, labor_time_minutes, yield_quantity, scrap_percentage, gmp_critical_step_flag, ipc_checkpoint_flag. This is the single authoritative source for all routing operation data — no separate operation entity exists.

attributes.name: plant_code
attributes.description: Manufacturing plant or facility where this routing is executed. Aligns with organizational plant master data.

attributes.name: production_scheduler_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the production scheduling strategy or algorithm used for this routing (e.g., forward scheduling, backward scheduling, finite capacity).

attributes.name: routing_number
attributes.description: Business identifier for the routing. Externally-known unique code used in production planning and scheduling systems.

attributes.name: routing_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the routing. Active routings are available for production scheduling; draft routings are under development; inactive routings are temporarily disabled; obsolete routings are retired; under_review routings are pending approval.

attributes.name: routing_type
attributes.description: Classification of the routing defining its usage pattern. Standard routings are default production paths; reference routings are templates; rate routings define production rates; alternative routings provide backup paths; special routings are for one-time or custom production runs.

attributes.name: standard_cost_amount
attributes.description: Standard production cost per base quantity for this routing, including labor, machine, and overhead costs. Used for cost accounting and variance analysis.

attributes.name: total_labor_time_minutes
attributes.description: Cumulative labor time across all operations in the routing, used for workforce planning and standard cost calculation.

attributes.name: total_machine_time_minutes
attributes.description: Cumulative machine processing time across all operations in the routing, used for capacity planning and Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) calculations.

attributes.name: total_setup_time_minutes
attributes.description: Cumulative setup time across all operations in the routing, used for capacity planning and scheduling.

attributes.name: total_standard_lead_time_hours
attributes.description: Total cumulative lead time in hours required to complete all operations in this routing, including setup, processing, and queue times. Used for Material Requirements Planning (MRP) and capacity planning.

attributes.name: valid_from_date
attributes.description: Date from which this routing becomes effective and available for production scheduling.

attributes.name: valid_to_date
attributes.description: Date until which this routing remains effective. Nullable for open-ended routings.

attributes.name: version
attributes.description: Version identifier for the routing, enabling tracking of routing changes over time. Supports engineering change management and audit trails.

products.name: production_order
products.description: Core transactional record representing a manufacturing production order issued to produce a specific SKU quantity at a facility. Captures order number, order type (PP01 standard, PP03 rework), SKU reference, plant, production line, scheduled start/finish dates, actual start/finish dates, order quantity, confirmed quantity, scrap quantity, order status (created, released, partially confirmed, technically complete, closed), MRP controller, and cost object. SSOT for production execution tracking in SAP S/4HANA PP.

attributes.name: production_order_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the production order. Primary key for the production order entity.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Cost accounting report requires each production order to be charged to a finance cost center for OPEX allocation.

attributes.name: demand_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.demand_plan. Business justification: In consumer goods S&OP, production orders are created to fulfill demand plan signals. This FK enables demand-to-production traceability for production planning reports, OTIF analysis, and IBP reconcil

attributes.name: event_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to promotion.promotion_event. Business justification: Consumer goods manufacturers create production orders for specific promotion events (e.g., display-ready pallet builds, promotional bundles). This link enables post-event analysis comparing actual pro

attributes.name: inspection_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_plan. Business justification: Production orders trigger an inspection plan; linking allows the order execution system to retrieve the exact inspection plan governing sampling and testing for that batch.

attributes.name: label_spec_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.label_spec. Business justification: Production orders in consumer goods must reference the approved label spec version to be applied during manufacturing. FDA 21 CFR Part 211 and EU GMP require correct label version control per producti

attributes.name: manufacturing_bom_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_bom. Business justification: Production order consumes a specific manufacturing BOM; adding manufacturing_bom_id FK connects BOM to order and eliminates isolation of manufacturing_bom.

attributes.name: packaging_spec_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.product_packaging_spec. Business justification: Production orders reference the specific packaging spec version to ensure correct materials are issued from warehouse. Used in engineering change order (ECO) management, quality release, and ensuring

attributes.name: planning_run_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.planning_run. Business justification: Production orders created directly by MRP runs (without planned order conversion) need traceability to the planning run. Enables planning run impact analysis and production schedule reconciliation — s

attributes.name: production_line_id
attributes.description: FK to manufacturing.production_line

attributes.name: routing_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.routing. Business justification: Each production order follows a routing; adding routing_id FK links routing to order and eliminates isolation of routing.

attributes.name: sales_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to sales.order. Business justification: Order fulfillment process requires linking each production order to the originating sales order to track manufacturing against sales commitments.

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the SKU being produced in this production order. Links to the product master data.

attributes.name: trade_promotion_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to promotion.trade_promotion. Business justification: Production orders in consumer goods are frequently created to fulfill promotional volume commitments. Linking production_order to trade_promotion enables S&OP reconciliation reports comparing planned

attributes.name: actual_cost
attributes.description: Actual cost incurred for the production order. Includes material, labor, and overhead costs. Used for variance analysis.

attributes.name: actual_finish_timestamp
attributes.description: Actual date and time when production execution completed. Used for OEE calculation and performance analysis.

attributes.name: actual_start_timestamp
attributes.description: Actual date and time when production execution began on the shop floor. Captured from MES system.

attributes.name: batch_number
attributes.description: Unique batch or lot number assigned to the production run. Critical for traceability and recall management per GMP requirements.

attributes.name: changeover_time_minutes
attributes.description: Time in minutes required for line changeover before starting this production order. Used for scheduling and efficiency analysis.

attributes.name: confirmed_quantity
attributes.description: Actual quantity produced and confirmed as good output. Represents yield after quality inspection.

attributes.name: cost_object
attributes.description: Cost object (production order number or process order) used for collecting actual costs. Links to CO-PC product costing.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the production order was created in the system. First event in order lifecycle.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for cost amounts. Typically company code currency.

attributes.name: downtime_minutes
attributes.description: Total unplanned downtime in minutes during production execution. Impacts OEE availability component.

attributes.name: gmp_compliance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this production order is subject to GMP compliance requirements per ISO 22716 standards. True for regulated products.

attributes.name: inspection_lot_number
attributes.description: Inspection lot number created for quality control of the production output. Links to QM inspection results.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time of the most recent update to the production order record. Used for change tracking and audit compliance.

attributes.name: material_number
attributes.description: SAP material number for the finished good being produced. Business identifier for the product in ERP system.

attributes.name: mrp_controller
attributes.description: Three-character code identifying the MRP controller responsible for planning this material. Links to planner master data.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments related to the production order. Captures special instructions, issues, or observations from shop floor.

attributes.name: oee_percentage
attributes.description: Overall Equipment Effectiveness percentage for this production run. Calculated as Availability × Performance × Quality. Industry standard KPI.

attributes.name: order_number
attributes.description: Business identifier for the production order. Externally-known unique order number assigned by SAP S/4HANA PP system.

attributes.name: order_quantity
attributes.description: Planned quantity to be produced in base unit of measure. Target output for the production order.

attributes.name: order_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the production order. CRTD=Created, REL=Released, PCNF=Partially Confirmed, TECO=Technically Complete, CNF=Confirmed, DLV=Delivered, CLSD=Closed. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CRTD|REL|PCNF|TECO|CNF|DLV|CLSD — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: order_type
attributes.description: Classification of production order. PP01=Standard Production, PP03=Rework, PP05=Co-Product, PP10=Process Order, PP20=Batch Order.

attributes.name: planned_cost
attributes.description: Standard or planned cost for producing the order quantity. Calculated from BOM and routing costs.

attributes.name: plant_code
attributes.description: Four-character code identifying the manufacturing facility where production occurs. Maps to SAP plant master.

attributes.name: priority
attributes.description: Priority level for production scheduling. 1=Highest priority (rush/expedite), 5=Lowest priority (standard). Used for sequencing and resource allocation.

attributes.name: production_supervisor
attributes.description: Name of the production supervisor responsible for overseeing execution of this order on the shop floor.

attributes.name: production_version
attributes.description: Production version defining the specific BOM and routing combination used. Enables multiple production methods for same material.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether quality inspection is mandatory before goods receipt. Drives QM integration and inspection lot creation.

attributes.name: released_by
attributes.description: User ID of the person who released the production order for execution. Audit trail for production authorization.

attributes.name: released_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the production order was released for shop floor execution. Triggers material availability check and capacity reservation.

attributes.name: scheduled_finish_date
attributes.description: Planned date when production is scheduled to complete. Used for capacity planning and delivery commitments.

attributes.name: scheduled_start_date
attributes.description: Planned date when production is scheduled to begin. Set during production planning and MRP run.

attributes.name: scrap_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of material scrapped or rejected during production. Used for yield analysis and cost accounting.

attributes.name: settlement_rule
attributes.description: Rule for settling production order costs. FUL=Full settlement, PAR=Partial settlement, PER=Periodic settlement.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Base unit of measure for quantities. Standard ISO codes such as EA (each), KG (kilogram), L (liter), M (meter).

attributes.name: yield_percentage
attributes.description: Actual yield percentage calculated as (confirmed_quantity / order_quantity) * 100. Key performance metric for production efficiency.

attributes.name: created_by
attributes.description: User ID of the person who created the production order in the system. Audit trail for order origination.

products.name: batch_record
products.description: Electronic batch manufacturing record (eBMR) capturing the complete GMP-compliant execution history for a production batch. Captures batch number, production order reference, SKU, batch size, manufacturing date, expiry date (FEFO), facility, production line, batch status (in-process, released, rejected, quarantine, recalled), GMP deviation flag, electronic signature records, yield percentage, and Veeva Vault document reference. SSOT for GMP batch traceability per ISO 22716 and FDA 21 CFR Part 211.
products.reference: Siemens Opcenter MES — Batch Record / Veeva Vault Quality Document

attributes.name: batch_record_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the electronic batch manufacturing record (eBMR). Primary key for GMP-compliant batch traceability.

attributes.name: certification_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.certification. Business justification: Batch records for certified products (organic, kosher, halal) must reference the applicable certification to prove compliance for that production lot. Certification body audits, retailer compliance re

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Batch cost roll‑up uses finance cost center to allocate raw material and labor expenses per batch.

attributes.name: label_spec_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.label_spec. Business justification: Batch records must document the exact label spec version used during manufacturing for GMP compliance and product recall traceability. FDA and EU GMP regulations require this as part of the batch manu

attributes.name: manufacturing_bom_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_bom. Business justification: A batch manufacturing record is executed against a specific Bill of Materials that defines the component materials, quantities, and scrap factors. The batch_record currently stores bom_version as a pl

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_facility. Business justification: Batch record should reference the specific manufacturing facility for traceability.

attributes.name: production_line_id
attributes.description: Reference to the specific production line used for this batch. Links to equipment master data.

attributes.name: production_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the production order that authorized this batch manufacturing run. Links to SAP PP production order master.

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.purchase_order. Business justification: Batch‑to‑PO traceability is needed for audit, recall, and cost allocation linking each manufactured batch to its sourcing PO.

attributes.name: routing_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.routing. Business justification: A batch manufacturing record is executed against a specific routing that defines the process sequence, operation steps, and standard times. The batch_record currently stores routing_version as a plain

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the finished goods SKU produced in this batch. Links to product master data.

attributes.name: actual_cost_amount
attributes.description: Actual cost per unit incurred for this batch. Includes material, labor, and overhead variances.

attributes.name: batch_number
attributes.description: Unique manufacturing batch identifier assigned at production initiation. Used for product traceability and recall management per GMP requirements.

attributes.name: batch_size_actual
attributes.description: Actual production quantity achieved for this batch. Used for yield calculation and inventory reconciliation.

attributes.name: batch_size_planned
attributes.description: Planned production quantity for this batch as specified in the production order. Measured in base unit of measure.

attributes.name: batch_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the batch. Controls inventory availability and distribution eligibility per GMP workflow.

attributes.name: changeover_minutes
attributes.description: Time in minutes required for line changeover before this batch. Key metric for SMED and lean manufacturing initiatives.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this batch record was first created in the system. Audit trail for record lifecycle.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for cost amounts. Supports multi-currency manufacturing operations.

attributes.name: downtime_minutes
attributes.description: Total unplanned downtime in minutes during batch production. Used for OEE calculation and maintenance planning.

attributes.name: electronic_signature_count
attributes.description: Number of electronic signatures captured during batch record lifecycle. Required for FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliance.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Date after which the product should not be used or sold. Critical for FEFO inventory management and consumer safety.

attributes.name: gmp_deviation_count
attributes.description: Number of GMP deviations recorded for this batch. Used for quality trend analysis and CAPA tracking.

attributes.name: gmp_deviation_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether any GMP deviations were recorded during batch production. Triggers quality review workflow.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this batch record was last updated. Audit trail for GMP compliance and data integrity.

attributes.name: lot_genealogy_complete_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether complete raw material lot traceability has been captured for this batch. Required for recall readiness.

attributes.name: manufacturing_date
attributes.description: Calendar date of batch production. Printed on product packaging for consumer information and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: manufacturing_end_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when batch production was completed and final packaging finished. Used for cycle time analysis.

attributes.name: manufacturing_start_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when batch production was initiated on the shop floor. Captured from MES system.

attributes.name: oee_percentage
attributes.description: Overall equipment effectiveness achieved during batch production. Composite metric of availability, performance, and quality.

attributes.name: quality_release_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the batch has been released by Quality Assurance for distribution. Required before inventory availability.

attributes.name: quality_release_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when Quality Assurance approved the batch for release. Marks transition from quarantine to available inventory.

attributes.name: recall_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this batch is subject to a product recall. Triggers supply chain hold and customer notification.

attributes.name: recall_initiated_date
attributes.description: Date when recall was initiated for this batch. Used for regulatory reporting and recall effectiveness tracking.

attributes.name: record_locked_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this batch record is locked from further edits. Required for GMP record integrity after quality release.

attributes.name: regulatory_hold_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether batch is on regulatory hold pending investigation or approval. Prevents distribution until cleared.

attributes.name: rework_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of product requiring rework during batch production. Indicator of process capability and quality issues.

attributes.name: scrap_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of product scrapped during batch production. Used for yield calculation and waste reduction analysis.

attributes.name: shelf_life_days
attributes.description: Number of days between manufacturing date and expiry date. Derived from product stability testing.

attributes.name: standard_cost_amount
attributes.description: Standard cost per unit for this batch based on BOM and routing. Used for cost variance analysis.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Unit of measure for batch size quantities (e.g., KG, LTR, EA, CS). Aligns with GS1 standards.

attributes.name: veeva_vault_document_reference
attributes.description: Reference to the master batch record document stored in Veeva Vault. Links to regulatory document management system.

attributes.name: yield_percentage
attributes.description: Ratio of actual batch size to planned batch size expressed as percentage. Key performance indicator for manufacturing efficiency.

products.name: production_confirmation
products.description: Shop floor execution and confirmation record capturing the complete lifecycle of each manufacturing operation within a production order — from assignment and scheduling through actual execution and final confirmation. Captures work order number, parent production order reference, operation number, work center, assigned operator, scheduled start/end, actual start/end, confirmation type (partial, final), confirmed yield quantity, confirmed scrap quantity, actual setup/machine/labor time, operation status (open, in-progress, completed, cancelled), posting date, and MES transaction reference (Siemens Opcenter). SSOT for granular shop floor execution tracking, labor confirmation, production order settlement, and OEE calculation. Subsumes discrete work order assignment data.
products.reference: SAP S/4HANA PP — Production Order Confirmation (CO11N)

attributes.name: production_confirmation_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the production confirmation record. Primary key for shop floor execution tracking.

attributes.name: batch_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.batch_record. Business justification: A production confirmation is a shop floor execution event that occurs within the context of a batch manufacturing record (eBMR). The production_confirmation currently stores batch_number as a plain ST

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Reference to the cost center to which labor and overhead costs for this operation are allocated for financial accounting.

attributes.name: inspection_lot_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: In-process control (IPC) inspections are triggered at production confirmation milestones. The production_confirmation.quality_inspection_required_flag signals an inspection lot must be created. Direct

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Reference to the manufacturing plant or facility where this operation was performed.

attributes.name: production_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent production order under which this operation was executed.

attributes.name: sales_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to sales.order. Business justification: Production confirmation reports must reference the sales order they fulfill for accurate shipping and invoicing.

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the finished or semi-finished material (SKU) produced by this operation.

attributes.name: work_center_id
attributes.description: Reference to the work center (production line, machine, or station) where this operation was performed.

attributes.name: activity_type
attributes.description: SAP CO activity type code representing the type of work performed (e.g., machine hours, labor hours, setup hours) for cost allocation purposes.

attributes.name: actual_end_datetime
attributes.description: Actual date and time when the operation was completed and confirmed by the operator. Used for OEE calculation and production order settlement.

attributes.name: actual_labor_time_minutes
attributes.description: Actual operator labor time spent on this operation including manual work, monitoring, and quality checks. Measured in minutes.

attributes.name: actual_machine_time_minutes
attributes.description: Actual time the machine or equipment was actively running during this operation. Excludes setup and downtime. Measured in minutes.

attributes.name: actual_setup_time_minutes
attributes.description: Actual time spent on machine setup, changeover, and preparation activities before production began. Measured in minutes.

attributes.name: actual_start_datetime
attributes.description: Actual date and time when the operator began executing this operation on the shop floor. Captured from MES or manual confirmation.

attributes.name: confirmation_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments entered by the operator or supervisor regarding this operation execution, including any issues or observations.

attributes.name: confirmation_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when this confirmation record was created and submitted to the ERP or MES system.

attributes.name: confirmation_type
attributes.description: Classification of the confirmation event indicating whether this is a partial progress update, final completion, milestone checkpoint, rework confirmation, or cancellation.

attributes.name: confirmed_scrap_quantity
attributes.description: Actual quantity of defective or waste material generated during this operation. Used for yield variance analysis and quality tracking.

attributes.name: confirmed_yield_quantity
attributes.description: Actual quantity of good output produced and confirmed for this operation. Measured in the base unit of measure for the material.

attributes.name: downtime_minutes
attributes.description: Total unplanned downtime during this operation due to equipment failure, material shortage, or other interruptions. Measured in minutes.

attributes.name: gmp_compliance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this operation was executed in compliance with GMP standards as required for regulated consumer goods products.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when this confirmation record was last updated or modified. Used for change tracking and audit purposes.

attributes.name: mes_transaction_reference
attributes.description: Unique transaction reference from the Siemens Opcenter MES system that originated this confirmation. Used for traceability and system reconciliation.

attributes.name: oee_availability_percent
attributes.description: Calculated availability component of OEE for this operation, representing the percentage of scheduled time that equipment was available for production.

attributes.name: oee_performance_percent
attributes.description: Calculated performance component of OEE for this operation, representing actual production speed versus ideal speed.

attributes.name: oee_quality_percent
attributes.description: Calculated quality component of OEE for this operation, representing the percentage of good output versus total output produced.

attributes.name: operation_number
attributes.description: Sequential operation identifier within the production order routing. Typically a 4-digit numeric code representing the step in the manufacturing process.

attributes.name: operation_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the manufacturing operation indicating its execution state in the production workflow.

attributes.name: posting_date
attributes.description: Financial posting date when this confirmation was recorded in the ERP system for inventory and cost accounting purposes.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this operation output requires quality inspection before release to inventory or next operation.

attributes.name: reversal_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this confirmation has been reversed or cancelled due to error correction or process adjustment.

attributes.name: reversal_reason_code
attributes.description: Standardized code explaining why this confirmation was reversed, if applicable. Used for process improvement and error tracking.

attributes.name: rework_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this confirmation represents a rework operation to correct defects from a previous production run.

attributes.name: scheduled_end_datetime
attributes.description: Planned completion date and time for this operation as determined by production scheduling or MES system.

attributes.name: scheduled_start_datetime
attributes.description: Planned start date and time for this operation as determined by production scheduling or MES system.

attributes.name: shift_code
attributes.description: Production shift identifier during which this operation was executed (e.g., SHIFT_1, DAY, NIGHT). Used for shift performance analysis.

attributes.name: source_system_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the originating system that created this confirmation record (SAP PP, Siemens Opcenter MES, or manual entry).

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Standard unit of measure for the confirmed quantities (e.g., KG for kilograms, EA for each, LT for liters). Aligns with material master UOM.

attributes.name: variance_reason_code
attributes.description: Standardized code explaining any significant variance between planned and actual quantities or times. Used for root cause analysis.

attributes.name: work_order_number
attributes.description: Business identifier for the work order assigned to this manufacturing operation. Externally visible reference used across shop floor systems.

products.name: planned_order
products.description: Production planning record representing the complete planning pipeline from S&OP/IBP through MRP execution to production order conversion. Encompasses both Master Production Schedule (MPS) entries (planned quantities by SKU/facility/period with schedule versioning) and MRP-generated planned orders (system-proposed production or procurement proposals). Captures planned order ID, order type (MPS, MRP planned, CBP), SKU, plant, MRP run reference, planned quantity, scheduled start/finish dates, planning period (week/month), schedule version, S&OP cycle reference, IBP plan version, firming indicator, schedule status (draft, firmed, released, converted, deleted), exception message code, planner ID, and conversion status. SSOT for MRP exception management, MPS governance, and the complete production planning pipeline from demand signal through to production order creation.

attributes.name: planned_order_id
attributes.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the planned order record. Primary key for the planned order entity.

attributes.name: converted_production_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the production order that was created from this planned order upon conversion. Null if not yet converted.

attributes.name: converted_purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.purchase_order. Business justification: MRP plan-to-procure conversion: planned orders with procurement_type='external' convert to purchase orders. Role-prefixed 'converted_' mirrors existing converted_production_order_id pattern. Enables M

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Planned orders carry preliminary cost assignments for MRP-driven capacity and cost planning. Consumer goods finance teams use planned order cost center assignments for budget vs. plan variance reporti

attributes.name: demand_plan_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.demand_plan. Business justification: Planned orders in MRP/IBP are directly generated from demand plan buckets. This FK replaces the denormalized demand_source_reference text field for demand-plan-sourced orders, enabling planning accura

attributes.name: manufacturing_bom_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_bom. Business justification: During MRP/IBP planning runs, a planned order is generated against a specific manufacturing BOM to calculate material requirements and component availability. Linking planned_order to manufacturing_bo

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Reference to the manufacturing plant or facility where production is planned to occur.

attributes.name: planning_run_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.planning_run. Business justification: Planned orders are outputs of MRP/IBP planning runs. This FK replaces denormalized mrp_run_code and mrp_run_date, enabling planning run performance analysis (how many orders generated, exception rates

attributes.name: routing_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.routing. Business justification: During MRP/IBP capacity planning, a planned order references a specific routing to calculate work center load, operation lead times, and scheduled start/finish dates. The planned_order already has pro

attributes.name: safety_stock_id
