attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality where the distribution center is located. Organizational contact data classified as confidential business information.

attributes.name: closed_date
attributes.description: Date when the distribution center ceased operations. Null for active facilities. Used for historical analysis and network optimization studies.

attributes.name: contact_email
attributes.description: Primary contact email address for the distribution center. Organizational contact data classified as confidential business information.

attributes.name: contact_phone
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number for the distribution center. Organizational contact data classified as confidential business information.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code where the distribution center is located.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this distribution center record was first created in the system. Audit trail for data lineage and compliance.

attributes.name: cross_dock_enabled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility supports cross-docking operations where inbound goods are directly transferred to outbound shipments with minimal storage time.

attributes.name: cycle_count_frequency_days
attributes.description: Standard frequency in days for cycle counting inventory at this facility. Used for inventory accuracy management and audit compliance.

attributes.name: dc_code
attributes.description: Business identifier code for the distribution center used across operational systems. Externally-known unique code for the facility.

attributes.name: dc_name
attributes.description: Official business name of the distribution center or warehouse facility.

attributes.name: dock_doors_inbound
attributes.description: Number of dock doors designated for inbound receiving operations. Impacts receiving throughput capacity and scheduling.

attributes.name: dock_doors_outbound
attributes.description: Number of dock doors designated for outbound shipping operations. Impacts shipping throughput capacity and carrier scheduling.

attributes.name: dsd_hub_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this facility serves as a DSD hub for direct-to-retail delivery operations. DSD hubs bypass traditional distribution channels for faster store replenishment.

attributes.name: facility_type
attributes.description: Classification of the distribution center based on temperature control and operational model. Ambient for room temperature, chilled for refrigerated, frozen for sub-zero, multi-temperature for mixed zones, DSD hub for Direct Store Delivery operations, cross-dock for flow-through distribution.

attributes.name: fsc_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility is certified under FSC chain of custody standards for sustainable sourcing. Required for handling FSC-certified paper and wood-based products.

attributes.name: gmp_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility is certified under Good Manufacturing Practice standards. Required for handling cosmetics, personal care, and certain consumer goods products.

attributes.name: hazmat_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility is certified to handle and store hazardous materials. Required for distribution of products with EPA or OSHA regulated substances.

attributes.name: inventory_rotation_method
attributes.description: Primary inventory rotation method used at this facility. FIFO (First In First Out) for standard goods, FEFO (First Expired First Out) for perishables and date-sensitive products, LIFO (Last In First Out) for specific use cases.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the distribution center in decimal degrees. Used for geospatial analytics, route optimization, and logistics planning.

attributes.name: lease_expiration_date
attributes.description: Expiration date of the facility lease agreement. Null for owned facilities. Used for lease renewal planning and facility strategy.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the distribution center in decimal degrees. Used for geospatial analytics, route optimization, and logistics planning.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this distribution center record was last modified. Audit trail for change tracking and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: opened_date
attributes.description: Date when the distribution center commenced operations. Used for facility age analysis and depreciation calculations.

attributes.name: operating_hours_weekday
attributes.description: Standard operating hours for weekdays in format HH:MM-HH:MM. Used for scheduling inbound deliveries, outbound shipments, and workforce planning.

attributes.name: operating_hours_weekend
attributes.description: Standard operating hours for weekends in format HH:MM-HH:MM. Used for scheduling weekend operations and carrier coordination.

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current operational state of the distribution center in its lifecycle. Active indicates full operations, inactive for temporarily closed, under construction for new facilities being built, decommissioned for permanently closed, seasonal for facilities operating only during peak periods, maintenance for temporary closure due to upgrades or repairs.

attributes.name: osa_target_percentage
attributes.description: Target OSA performance percentage for stores served by this distribution center. OSA measures product availability at retail shelf level.

attributes.name: otif_target_percentage
attributes.business_glossary_term: On Time In Full (OTIF) Target Percentage
attributes.description: Target OTIF performance percentage for this distribution center. OTIF measures the percentage of orders delivered on time and in full, a key supply chain KPI.

tag_set.value: On Time In Full (OTIF) Target Percentage

attributes.name: ownership_type
attributes.description: Classification of facility ownership model. Owned for company-owned facilities, leased for long-term leased properties, third-party logistics for 3PL-operated warehouses.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the distribution center address. Organizational contact data classified as confidential business information.

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: Purpose classification: distribution, cross-dock, hub

attributes.name: sap_plant_code
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA plant code representing this distribution center in the ERP system. Maps to the SAP MM and WM modules for material management and warehouse management.

attributes.name: sap_storage_location
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA storage location code within the plant. Represents the primary storage location identifier for inventory transactions in SAP WM module.

attributes.name: shifts_per_day
attributes.description: Number of operational shifts per day at the facility. Used for labor planning, throughput capacity modeling, and operational cost analysis.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or regional administrative division where the facility is located. Organizational contact data classified as confidential business information.

attributes.name: storage_capacity_pallet_positions
attributes.description: Maximum number of pallet positions available for storage. Key metric for inventory capacity planning and space utilization analysis.

attributes.name: temperature_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the facility has temperature-controlled storage zones. True for facilities with chilled or frozen capabilities, false for ambient-only.

attributes.name: time_zone
attributes.description: IANA time zone identifier for the distribution center location. Used for scheduling, shift planning, and cross-facility coordination.

attributes.name: total_capacity_sqft
attributes.description: Total warehouse floor space capacity in square feet. Includes all storage, staging, and operational areas within the facility.

attributes.name: wms_site_code
attributes.description: Unique site identifier in the Blue Yonder WMS system. Used for integration and synchronization between the lakehouse and the operational WMS platform.

products.name: storage_location
products.description: Physical storage bin/slot/rack within a distribution facility (WMS-managed). SSOT for physical DC location layout. Distinct from inventory.inventory_storage_location which is the logical inventory holding location.

attributes.name: storage_location_id
attributes.description: Primary key for storage_location

attributes.name: distribution_facility_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the parent distribution center facility where this storage location resides.

attributes.name: abc_classification
attributes.description: Velocity-based classification of the location for slotting optimization: A (high-velocity/fast-moving), B (medium-velocity), C (low-velocity/slow-moving).

attributes.name: aisle
attributes.description: Aisle designation within the warehouse layout for physical navigation and picking route optimization.

attributes.name: bay
attributes.description: Bay or column position within the aisle for precise horizontal location reference.

attributes.name: bin_position
attributes.description: Specific bin or slot position within the level for granular inventory placement and retrieval.

attributes.name: blocked_date
attributes.description: Date when the storage location was blocked or made unavailable for operations.

attributes.name: blocked_reason
attributes.description: Explanation for why the location is blocked or unavailable, such as maintenance, damage, safety hold, or quality quarantine.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the storage location record was first created in the WMS system.

attributes.name: cycle_count_frequency
attributes.description: Scheduled frequency for cycle counting inventory at this location to maintain inventory accuracy and compliance.

attributes.name: distribution_storage_location_level
attributes.description: Vertical level or shelf position within the bay for height-based slotting and equipment compatibility.

attributes.name: dsd_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the location is designated for DSD operations where products bypass the DC and are delivered directly to retail stores.

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: Date when the storage location became active and available for warehouse operations.

attributes.name: equipment_type_required
attributes.description: Type of material handling equipment required to access this storage location for put-away and picking operations.

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when the storage location is scheduled to be decommissioned or removed from active use. Null for indefinite locations.

attributes.name: fefo_eligible_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: First Expired First Out (FEFO) Eligible Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the location supports FEFO inventory rotation logic for expiry-sensitive products (pharmaceuticals, food, cosmetics).

tag_set.value: First Expired First Out (FEFO) Eligible Flag

attributes.name: fifo_eligible_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: First In First Out (FIFO) Eligible Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the location supports FIFO inventory rotation logic for age-based stock management.

tag_set.value: First In First Out (FIFO) Eligible Flag

attributes.name: hazmat_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the location is certified and equipped for storing hazardous materials per OSHA and EPA regulations.

attributes.name: height_cm
attributes.description: Physical height dimension of the storage location in centimeters for vertical clearance and equipment reach validation.

attributes.name: last_cycle_count_date
attributes.description: Date when the most recent cycle count was performed at this storage location.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the storage location record was most recently updated in the WMS system.

attributes.name: length_cm
attributes.description: Physical length dimension of the storage location in centimeters for dimensional slotting and equipment compatibility.

attributes.name: location_code
attributes.description: Business identifier for the storage location as defined in Blue Yonder WMS. Typically formatted as aisle-bay-level-bin (e.g., A01-B05-L03-P12).

attributes.name: location_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name or description of the storage location for operational reference.

attributes.name: location_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the storage location indicating availability for inventory placement and retrieval.

attributes.name: location_type
attributes.description: Classification of the storage location by operational function: bulk storage, active pick face, reserve inventory, staging area, dock door, or cross-dock zone.

attributes.name: mixed_lot_allowed_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the location permits storage of multiple lot or batch numbers for the same SKU or requires lot segregation.

attributes.name: mixed_sku_allowed_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Mixed Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) Allowed Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the location permits storage of multiple SKUs simultaneously or requires single-SKU dedication.

tag_set.value: Mixed Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) Allowed Flag

attributes.name: pick_face_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this location is designated as an active pick face for order fulfillment operations.

attributes.name: picking_strategy
attributes.description: Order fulfillment picking method supported by this location: batch picking, wave picking, zone picking, discrete (single-order), or cluster picking.

attributes.name: putaway_strategy
attributes.description: Algorithm used to assign incoming inventory to this location: directed (system-assigned), random, fixed (dedicated SKU), or dynamic (velocity-based).

attributes.name: replenishment_priority
attributes.description: Priority ranking for automated replenishment from reserve to pick locations, with lower numbers indicating higher priority.

attributes.name: temperature_zone
attributes.description: Temperature control classification for the storage location to ensure product integrity and regulatory compliance (ambient, refrigerated 2-8°C, frozen <-18°C, controlled room temperature).

attributes.name: volume_capacity_m3
attributes.description: Maximum volume capacity of the storage location in cubic meters for space utilization and slotting algorithms.

attributes.name: weight_capacity_kg
attributes.description: Maximum weight capacity of the storage location in kilograms for safe load management and slotting optimization.

attributes.name: width_cm
attributes.description: Physical width dimension of the storage location in centimeters for dimensional slotting and equipment compatibility.

attributes.name: zone_code
attributes.description: Logical zone classification within the distribution center for grouping locations by product category, velocity, or operational workflow (e.g., FAST-PICK, SLOW-MOVE, HAZMAT).

products.name: inbound_receipt
products.description: Transactional record capturing the physical receipt of goods at a DC from suppliers, manufacturing plants, or inter-DC transfers. Records ASN reference, carrier, trailer/container ID, dock door, receipt date/time, received quantity by SKU/lot, temperature check results, and discrepancy flags. Integrates with SAP WM goods receipt and Blue Yonder WMS inbound processing. Drives inventory on-hand updates and FEFO/FIFO lot registration.

attributes.name: inbound_receipt_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the inbound receipt transaction. Primary key for this entity.

attributes.name: company_code_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Inbound receipts must be posted to a specific company code for goods receipt accounting in multi-entity consumer goods companies. Drives intercompany inventory transfer postings, statutory inventory r

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Receiving operations incur expenses (labor, equipment) that are allocated to a cost center for expense tracking and budgeting.

attributes.name: goods_receipt_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.goods_receipt. Business justification: WMS-to-ERP reconciliation: the distribution inbound_receipt (WMS physical receipt) must be matched to the procurement goods_receipt (ERP posting) for accounts payable three-way match and audit complia

attributes.name: inspection_lot_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: Goods receipt quality inspection process: when inbound_receipt triggers quality inspection (quality_inspection_required_flag=true), an inspection_lot is created. This FK links the receipt to its quali

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_facility. Business justification: Internal transfer receipt: inbound receipts from own plants need the source manufacturing facility to track internal logistics and cost allocation.

attributes.name: nonconformance_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.nonconformance. Business justification: Supplier nonconformance management: when received goods fail inspection, a nonconformance record is raised against the receipt. This FK enables supplier quality tracking, CAPA initiation from receipt

attributes.name: primary_inbound_distribution_facility_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the distribution center facility where the goods were received.

attributes.name: production_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.production_order. Business justification: Plant-to-DC finished goods transfer: when a production order's output is shipped to a distribution center, the inbound receipt at the DC must reference the originating production order for OTIF tracki

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Goods receipt postings in consumer goods must be attributed to a profit center for inventory valuation and COGS tracking by business segment. Procurement and supply chain teams report inbound receipt

attributes.name: replenishment_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supply_replenishment_order. Business justification: Inbound receipts are the physical fulfillment of supply replenishment orders. Receiving teams reconcile receipts against replenishment orders for OTIF compliance, discrepancy management, and goods rec

attributes.name: return_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to sales.return_order. Business justification: Reverse logistics / returns processing: when a retailer returns goods, a return_order is raised in sales and an inbound_receipt is created in distribution to physically receive returned stock. Linking

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the supplier or vendor who shipped the goods, representing the counterparty in this receipt transaction.

attributes.name: usage_decision_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.usage_decision. Business justification: Goods receipt disposition process: after inspection, a usage_decision (accept/reject/rework) determines whether received goods proceed to putaway or are returned to supplier. This FK links the receipt

attributes.name: accepted_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of goods accepted into inventory after quality inspection, excluding rejected or damaged items.

attributes.name: actual_receipt_timestamp
attributes.description: Precise date and time when the physical goods arrived and were checked in at the receiving dock, representing the principal business event for this transaction.

attributes.name: asn_number
attributes.description: Reference to the Advanced Shipping Notice document sent by the supplier prior to shipment arrival, enabling pre-receipt planning and dock scheduling.

attributes.name: case_count
attributes.description: Number of cases or cartons received in this inbound shipment.

attributes.name: container_number
attributes.description: ISO standard container identifier for ocean freight shipments, following the BIC (Bureau International des Containers) format.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this receipt record was first created in the system, representing the audit trail start point.

attributes.name: discrepancy_flag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether any discrepancies (quantity, quality, or documentation) were identified during the receiving process.

attributes.name: discrepancy_notes
attributes.description: Free-text description providing additional details about any discrepancies identified during the receiving process.

attributes.name: discrepancy_reason
attributes.description: Classification of the type of discrepancy identified during receiving, used for root cause analysis and supplier performance management.

attributes.name: dock_door_number
attributes.description: Physical dock door location where the inbound shipment was unloaded, used for labor planning and dock utilization tracking.

attributes.name: expected_quantity
attributes.description: Total quantity of goods expected to be received based on the ASN or purchase order, used for discrepancy detection.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this receipt record was last updated, supporting audit trail and data lineage requirements.

attributes.name: otif_compliant_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: On Time In Full (OTIF) Compliant Flag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether this receipt met both on-time delivery and complete quantity requirements, key supplier performance metric.

tag_set.value: On Time In Full (OTIF) Compliant Flag

attributes.name: pallet_count
attributes.description: Number of pallets received in this inbound shipment, used for dock capacity planning and labor allocation.

attributes.name: putaway_completion_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when all received goods were moved from the receiving dock to their designated storage locations, completing the inbound process.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether formal quality inspection was required for this receipt based on product category, supplier risk profile, or regulatory requirements.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_status
attributes.description: Current status of the quality inspection process for this receipt, tracking progression through quality control workflow.

attributes.name: receipt_completion_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when all receiving activities (unloading, inspection, put-away) were completed and the receipt was closed in the WMS.

attributes.name: receipt_number
attributes.description: Externally-known business identifier for the inbound receipt, used for tracking and reference across systems and with suppliers.

attributes.name: receipt_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the inbound receipt transaction, tracking progression from scheduling through completion or exception handling.

attributes.name: receipt_type
attributes.description: Classification of the inbound receipt based on the source and nature of the goods being received.

attributes.name: received_quantity
attributes.description: Actual total quantity of goods physically received and counted during the receiving process.

attributes.name: rejected_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of goods rejected during receiving due to quality issues, damage, or non-conformance to specifications.

attributes.name: scheduled_receipt_date
attributes.description: Planned date for the inbound shipment to arrive at the distribution center, based on ASN or supplier commitment.

attributes.name: seal_intact_flag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether the security seal was found intact upon arrival, critical for quality control and loss prevention.

attributes.name: seal_number
attributes.description: Security seal identifier applied to the trailer or container, verified upon receipt to ensure shipment integrity and prevent tampering.

attributes.name: temperature_check_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether temperature verification was required for this receipt due to cold chain or temperature-sensitive product requirements.

attributes.name: temperature_compliant_flag
attributes.description: Indicator of whether the recorded temperature was within acceptable range per product specifications and cold chain requirements.

attributes.name: temperature_reading_celsius
attributes.description: Actual temperature reading in Celsius recorded during receipt inspection for temperature-sensitive products, critical for cold chain compliance.

attributes.name: trailer_number
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the trailer or truck that delivered the shipment, used for tracking and carrier performance analysis.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Standard unit of measure for the quantities recorded in this receipt (Each, Case, Pallet, Kilogram, Pound, Liter, Gallon). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EA|CS|PL|EA|KG|LB|LT|GL — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

products.name: inbound_receipt_line
products.description: Line-level detail for each SKU/lot received within an inbound receipt transaction. Captures SKU code, GTIN, lot number, manufacture date, expiry date, received quantity (cases and eaches), unit of measure, pallet ID, temperature at receipt, and variance from expected ASN quantity. Supports FEFO/FIFO lot registration and discrepancy resolution workflows.
products.reference: GR Line Item / WMS Receipt Line

attributes.name: inbound_receipt_line_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the inbound receipt line. Primary key for this entity.

attributes.name: batch_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.batch_record. Business justification: GMP and FDA traceability require linking each received line item to its manufacturing batch record. Consumer goods DCs receiving finished goods from plants must validate batch/lot against the batch re

attributes.name: inbound_receipt_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent inbound receipt header transaction. Links this line to the overall receipt event.

attributes.name: inspection_lot_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: Line-level goods receipt quality inspection: each receipt line (specific SKU/lot) may generate a distinct inspection_lot. This FK enables granular traceability from received line to quality result, su

attributes.name: po_line_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.po_line. Business justification: Three-way match (PO qty vs. received qty vs. invoice qty) is a core procurement control in consumer goods. Linking receipt lines to PO lines enables automated variance detection, OTIF measurement at l

attributes.name: putaway_distribution_storage_location_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Putaway Distribution Storage Location Id (Foreign Key)
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.distribution_storage_location. Business justification: Each inbound receipt line is put away to a specific storage location within the DC. This FK captures the physical putaway destination at the line level, enabling FEFO/FIFO rotation tracking, cycle cou

tag_set.value: Putaway Distribution Storage Location Id (Foreign Key)

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Link receipt line to SKU master for traceability and quality inspection; required by receipt processing and compliance audit reports.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier or vendor who shipped the goods. Used for supplier performance tracking and procurement analytics.

attributes.name: asn_line_number
attributes.description: Line number within the ASN document corresponding to this receipt line. Enables automated matching between ASN and physical receipt.

attributes.name: asn_number
attributes.description: Advanced Shipping Notice document number sent by the supplier prior to shipment arrival. Used for pre-receipt planning and variance detection.

attributes.name: condition_code
attributes.description: Quality condition assessment of the received goods. Determines whether product can be put away into available inventory or requires special handling.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this receipt line record was first created in the warehouse management system. Audit trail for data lineage.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the unit cost and extended cost. Supports multi-currency procurement operations.

attributes.name: damage_description
attributes.description: Free-text description of any damage, defects, or quality issues observed during receipt inspection. Used for claims and supplier performance tracking.

attributes.name: expected_quantity_cases
attributes.description: Expected quantity in cases as specified in the Advanced Shipping Notice (ASN) or purchase order. Used for variance detection.

attributes.name: expected_quantity_eaches
attributes.description: Expected quantity in eaches as specified in the Advanced Shipping Notice (ASN) or purchase order. Used for variance detection.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Date when the product expires and can no longer be sold or used. Critical for FEFO rotation and inventory management in consumer goods.

attributes.name: extended_cost
attributes.description: Total cost for this receipt line calculated as unit cost multiplied by received quantity. Used for inventory valuation and financial reconciliation.

attributes.name: gtin
attributes.description: Global Trade Item Number uniquely identifying the product in the supply chain. May be GTIN-8, GTIN-12, GTIN-13, or GTIN-14 format.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this receipt line record was last updated. Audit trail for tracking changes to receipt data.

attributes.name: line_number
attributes.description: Sequential line number within the inbound receipt. Used for ordering and referencing specific lines in the receipt document.

attributes.name: lot_number
attributes.description: Manufacturing lot or batch number assigned by the supplier. Critical for traceability, quality control, and recall management in consumer goods.

attributes.name: manufacture_date
attributes.description: Date when the product was manufactured by the supplier. Used for shelf-life calculations and FEFO inventory rotation.

attributes.name: pallet_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the pallet or handling unit containing this receipt line. Used for put-away and storage location assignment.

attributes.name: put_away_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the goods were put away into their assigned storage location. Used for warehouse productivity and cycle time measurement.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this receipt line requires quality inspection before being released to available inventory. True for regulated or high-risk products.

attributes.name: quality_inspection_status
attributes.description: Status of quality inspection for this receipt line. Determines whether goods can be released to available inventory or must remain in quarantine.

attributes.name: receipt_status
attributes.description: Current processing status of this receipt line within the warehouse workflow. Tracks progression from initial receipt through put-away completion.

attributes.name: received_quantity_cases
attributes.description: Quantity of product received measured in cases. Represents the outer packaging unit typically used for warehouse handling.

attributes.name: received_quantity_eaches
attributes.description: Quantity of product received measured in individual units (eaches). Represents the consumer-facing unit count.

attributes.name: received_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the goods were physically received at the warehouse dock. Critical for OTIF performance measurement and cycle time analytics.

attributes.name: sscc
attributes.description: 18-digit Serial Shipping Container Code identifying the logistics unit. Global standard for tracking pallets and containers in the supply chain.

attributes.name: temperature_at_receipt_celsius
attributes.description: Temperature measurement in Celsius recorded at the time of receipt. Critical for cold chain compliance and product quality verification.

attributes.name: unit_cost
attributes.description: Cost per unit for the received goods as specified in the purchase order. Used for inventory valuation and COGS calculation.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Primary unit of measure for the received quantity. Defines the counting and handling unit for warehouse operations.

attributes.name: upc
attributes.description: Universal Product Code barcode identifier for the received item. Standard 12-digit UPC-A format used in North American retail.

attributes.name: variance_quantity_cases
attributes.description: Difference between expected and received quantity in cases. Positive values indicate overages, negative values indicate shortages.

attributes.name: variance_quantity_eaches
attributes.description: Difference between expected and received quantity in eaches. Positive values indicate overages, negative values indicate shortages.

attributes.name: warehouse_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the distribution center or warehouse facility where the receipt occurred. Used for multi-site inventory management.

products.name: outbound_order
products.description: Master outbound fulfillment order record representing a customer or retailer replenishment request to be fulfilled from a DC. Captures order number, order type (retail replenishment, DSD, e-commerce, inter-DC transfer), customer/account reference, requested ship date, required delivery date, priority, OTIF commitment, and order status lifecycle. Sourced from SAP SD and Salesforce Consumer Goods Cloud order management.
products.reference: Outbound Delivery Order / SAP SD Delivery

attributes.name: outbound_order_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the outbound fulfillment order. Primary key for the outbound order entity.

attributes.name: company_code_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Outbound orders are booked under a company code for revenue recognition and statutory reporting in multi-entity consumer goods organizations. Required for order-to-cash financial posting, intercompany

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Outbound order fulfillment incurs warehouse labor and operational costs charged to a cost center for internal cost accounting. Consumer goods DC operations track order processing costs by cost center

attributes.name: order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the originating sales order document in the ERP system. Links outbound fulfillment to revenue recognition and customer order management.

attributes.name: primary_outbound_distribution_facility_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the distribution center fulfilling the outbound order. Determines inventory source and warehouse operations responsible for order execution.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Needed for revenue recognition and profit‑center reporting; each outbound order's sales revenue is attributed to a profit center.

attributes.name: retail_store_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to sales.retail_store. Business justification: DSD (Direct Store Delivery) and store-level OTIF tracking require linking outbound orders to the specific retail store being fulfilled. Enables store-level fill-rate reporting, DSD route planning, and

attributes.name: trade_account_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the customer or retail account placing the outbound order. Links to trade account master for customer details, pricing agreements, and delivery preferences.

attributes.name: trade_promotion_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to promotion.trade_promotion. Business justification: Trade promotion execution reporting in consumer goods requires linking outbound orders directly to the parent trade promotion for OTIF-by-promotion, fill-rate-by-promotion, and deduction management re

attributes.name: actual_delivery_date
attributes.description: Date when the order was actually delivered to the customer destination. Used to calculate OTIF performance and delivery lead time.

attributes.name: actual_ship_date
attributes.description: Date when the order was actually shipped from the distribution center. Used to measure warehouse execution performance against requested ship date.

attributes.name: backorder_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether any line items on the order are backordered due to insufficient inventory. True when ordered quantity exceeds available stock.

attributes.name: bill_of_lading_number
attributes.description: Carrier-issued document number serving as receipt of goods and contract of carriage. Required for freight claims and proof of delivery.

attributes.name: cancellation_reason
attributes.description: Reason code or description explaining why the order was cancelled. Examples include customer request, inventory shortage, credit hold, or duplicate order. Used for root cause analysis.

attributes.name: cancelled_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the order was cancelled. Null for active orders. Used for cancellation rate analysis and order lifecycle reporting.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the outbound order record was first created in the system. Audit field for data lineage and order lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the order value. Typically USD for domestic US operations, but may vary for export orders.

attributes.name: fill_rate_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage of ordered quantity that was fulfilled from available inventory. Calculated as (shipped quantity / ordered quantity) * 100. Key metric for inventory availability and customer service.

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the order contains hazardous materials requiring special handling, labeling, and transportation compliance. True for products regulated under DOT hazmat rules.

attributes.name: incoterm
attributes.description: International Commercial Terms defining the division of costs and risks between buyer and seller. Critical for export orders and freight responsibility determination. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAP|DPU|DDP|FAS|FOB|CFR|CIF — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the outbound order record was last updated. Audit field for change tracking and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: order_date
attributes.description: Date when the outbound order was created or received from the customer. Principal business event timestamp for order lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: order_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the outbound order. Draft indicates order creation, released means ready for fulfillment, picking/packing/staged represent warehouse execution phases, shipped indicates in-transit, delivered confirms receipt, cancelled indicates order termination. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|released|picking|packing|staged|shipped|delivered|cancelled — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: order_type
attributes.description: Classification of the outbound order based on fulfillment channel and destination. Retail replenishment serves store orders, DSD (Direct Store Delivery) bypasses DC, ecommerce serves online consumers, inter-DC transfer moves inventory between distribution centers, wholesale serves B2B customers, export serves international markets.

attributes.name: otif_commitment_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: On Time In Full (OTIF) Commitment Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this order is subject to formal OTIF performance measurement and customer scorecard reporting. True for orders with contractual delivery commitments.

tag_set.value: On Time In Full (OTIF) Commitment Flag

attributes.name: packing_slip_number
attributes.description: Document number for the packing slip accompanying the shipment. Used for customer receiving and invoice reconciliation.

attributes.name: payment_terms
attributes.description: Payment terms agreed with the customer for this order. Examples include Net 30, Net 60, COD (Cash on Delivery), or prepaid. Impacts accounts receivable and cash flow management.

attributes.name: pick_ticket_number
attributes.description: Warehouse document number used to direct picking operations for this order. Generated by WMS when order is released to the warehouse floor.

attributes.name: priority_code
attributes.description: Priority level assigned to the outbound order for warehouse sequencing and resource allocation. Critical orders receive highest priority, rush orders are expedited, expedited orders have faster processing, standard orders follow normal flow.

attributes.name: proof_of_delivery_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when delivery was confirmed by the recipient. Captured from carrier POD or customer signature. Used for OTIF measurement and freight audit.

attributes.name: purchase_order_number
attributes.description: Customer's purchase order number provided for order tracking and invoice reconciliation. Required for EDI (Electronic Data Interchange) transactions with retail customers.

attributes.name: requested_ship_date
attributes.description: Date when the customer or system requests the order to be shipped from the distribution center. Used for warehouse planning and scheduling.

attributes.name: required_delivery_date
attributes.description: Date by which the order must be delivered to the customer destination. Critical for OTIF (On Time In Full) performance measurement and SLA compliance.

attributes.name: service_level
attributes.description: Delivery speed commitment for the outbound order. Determines carrier selection, freight cost, and OTIF measurement criteria.

attributes.name: shipping_method
attributes.description: Transportation mode used for order delivery. Ground for truck, air for expedited freight, ocean for international, rail for bulk, parcel for small packages, LTL (Less Than Truckload) for partial loads, FTL (Full Truckload) for full loads. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ground|air|ocean|rail|parcel|ltl|ftl — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: special_handling_instructions
attributes.description: Free-text instructions for warehouse and logistics teams regarding special handling requirements. May include temperature control, fragile handling, hazmat procedures, or customer-specific delivery instructions.

attributes.name: temperature_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the order requires temperature-controlled storage and transportation. True for cold chain products requiring refrigeration or freezing.

attributes.name: total_order_quantity
attributes.description: Total quantity of units across all line items in the outbound order. Used for warehouse capacity planning and OTIF fill rate calculation.

attributes.name: total_order_value
attributes.description: Total monetary value of the outbound order before taxes and freight charges. Used for order prioritization, credit limit checks, and revenue forecasting.

attributes.name: total_order_volume_m3
attributes.description: Total volume of the outbound order in cubic meters. Used for warehouse space planning, truck cube utilization, and pallet configuration.

attributes.name: total_order_weight_kg
attributes.description: Total weight of the outbound order in kilograms. Used for freight cost calculation, carrier capacity planning, and vehicle loading optimization.

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: Carrier-provided tracking number for shipment visibility and customer self-service tracking. Used for parcel and LTL shipments.

attributes.name: wave_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the warehouse wave that includes this order. Wave picking groups orders for efficient batch picking and resource optimization.

products.name: outbound_order_line
products.description: Line-level detail for each SKU within an outbound fulfillment order. Records SKU code, GTIN, ordered quantity, confirmed quantity, allocated quantity, picked quantity, shipped quantity, unit of measure, lot number, expiry date, and line-level OTIF status. Enables order fill rate tracking, short-ship identification, and OSA impact analysis at the SKU-customer level.
products.reference: Delivery Order Line / SAP SD Item

attributes.name: outbound_order_line_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the outbound order line item.

attributes.name: atp_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.atp_record. Business justification: ATP checks are performed at the order line level when confirming outbound order lines. Linking each outbound_order_line to the ATP record that confirmed availability enables fulfillment traceability a

attributes.name: batch_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.batch_record. Business justification: Batch-level shipment traceability: consumer goods companies must track which manufacturing batch was shipped on each order line for recall notification to customers, regulatory reporting, and FEFO com

attributes.name: batch_release_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.batch_release. Business justification: Batch-level outbound traceability: each order line ships a specific batch that must have an approved batch_release. This FK enables lot traceability reporting, recall readiness (which customers receiv

attributes.name: outbound_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent outbound fulfillment order header.

attributes.name: storage_location_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.distribution_storage_location. Business justification: Outbound order line items are stored in a DC location before picking. Adding a FK to distribution_storage_location enables location lookup and normalizes location data.

attributes.name: actual_ship_date
attributes.description: Actual date the line was shipped from the distribution center.

attributes.name: allocated_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity allocated from warehouse inventory to this order line.

attributes.name: base_unit_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity converted to base unit of measure for standardized reporting and inventory tracking.

attributes.name: confirmed_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity confirmed available for fulfillment after ATP (Available to Promise) check.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the outbound order line record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: customer_po_line_number
attributes.description: Customer's purchase order line number for cross-reference and reconciliation.

attributes.name: dsd_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line is part of a direct store delivery order bypassing retailer distribution centers.

attributes.name: edi_line_reference
attributes.description: EDI transaction line reference number for electronic order processing and ASN generation.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Product expiration date for FEFO inventory rotation and shelf-life management.

attributes.name: gtin
attributes.description: Global trade item number (GTIN-8, GTIN-12, GTIN-13, or GTIN-14) for the product being shipped.

attributes.name: handling_unit_code
attributes.description: Serial shipping container code (SSCC) or handling unit identifier for the container holding this line item.

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line contains hazardous materials requiring special handling and documentation.

attributes.name: line_number
attributes.description: Sequential line number within the outbound order for ordering and identification.

attributes.name: line_status
attributes.description: Current fulfillment status of the order line in the warehouse execution lifecycle. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: open|allocated|picked|packed|shipped|cancelled|short_shipped — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: line_volume_m3
attributes.description: Total volume of the shipped quantity for this line in cubic meters.

attributes.name: line_weight_kg
attributes.description: Total weight of the shipped quantity for this line in kilograms.

attributes.name: lot_number
attributes.description: Manufacturing lot or batch number for traceability and quality control.

attributes.name: ordered_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of the SKU originally requested by the customer in the order.

attributes.name: otif_status
attributes.description: Line-level OTIF performance status indicating whether the line was delivered on time and in full quantity.

attributes.name: pack_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the line item was packed into shipping containers.

attributes.name: packed_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity packed into shipping containers and ready for dispatch.

attributes.name: pallet_code
attributes.description: Pallet identifier if the line item was shipped on a palletized load.

attributes.name: pick_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the line item was picked from warehouse inventory.

attributes.name: pick_zone
attributes.description: Warehouse pick zone designation for labor management and routing optimization.

attributes.name: picked_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity physically picked from warehouse storage locations during fulfillment.

attributes.name: requested_ship_date
attributes.description: Customer-requested or system-calculated target ship date for this line.

attributes.name: serial_numbers
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of serial numbers for serialized inventory items shipped on this line.

attributes.name: ship_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the line item was shipped from the distribution center.

attributes.name: shipped_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity actually shipped to the customer, may differ from ordered due to short-ship scenarios.

attributes.name: short_ship_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line was short-shipped (shipped quantity less than ordered quantity).

attributes.name: short_ship_reason_code
attributes.description: Reason code for short shipment (OOS=Out of Stock, DAMAGE=Damaged Inventory, RECALL=Product Recall, EXPIRED=Expired Product, ALLOCATION=Allocation Constraint).

attributes.name: temperature_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line requires temperature-controlled storage and transportation.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Unit of measure for quantities (EA=Each, CS=Case, PL=Pallet, BX=Box, KG=Kilogram, LB=Pound, LT=Liter, GL=Gallon). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EA|CS|PL|BX|KG|LB|LT|GL — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: unit_volume_m3
attributes.description: Volume per unit of the SKU in cubic meters for space utilization and load planning.

attributes.name: unit_weight_kg
attributes.description: Weight per unit of the SKU in kilograms for freight calculation and capacity planning.

attributes.name: upc
attributes.description: Universal product code (UPC-A) for retail scanning and point-of-sale identification.

attributes.name: warehouse_location_code
attributes.description: Distribution center or warehouse location code from which this line was fulfilled.

products.name: pick_task
products.description: Fulfillment task record covering both picking and packing operations within DC outbound execution. For picking: captures pick list reference, source location, SKU, lot, pick quantity, assigned operator, wave/batch reference, pick accuracy flag, and task timestamps. For packing: captures pack station, carton/pallet ID, packed SKUs and quantities, packaging material, gross weight, dimensions, GS1-128/SSCC label, and packer operator. Supports wave picking, batch picking, zone picking, and cartonization strategies in Blue Yonder WMS. Task_type discriminator distinguishes pick vs pack execution steps.

attributes.name: pick_task_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the pick task record. Primary key for the pick_task data product.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Pick task labor costs are charged to a cost center; required for labor cost analysis and OTIF performance metrics.

attributes.name: destination_location_distribution_storage_location_id
attributes.description: Reference to the target location where picked items are staged or packed (e.g., pack station, staging lane, loading dock).

attributes.name: distribution_facility_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the distribution center or warehouse where the pick task is executed.

attributes.name: outbound_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent outbound order or shipment order that generated this pick task.

attributes.name: primary_pick_distribution_storage_location_id
attributes.description: Reference to the warehouse storage location (bin, shelf, pallet position) from which inventory is picked.

attributes.name: shipment_distribution_shipment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.distribution_shipment. Business justification: Pick and pack tasks are the operational execution units that feed into outbound shipments. Many pick tasks are consolidated into a single distribution shipment (one shipment = many cartons/tasks). Thi

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the product SKU being picked or packed in this task.

attributes.name: carton_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the carton or shipping container into which items are packed. May be a license plate number (LPN) or SSCC (Serial Shipping Container Code).

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the pick task record was first created in the WMS. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: dsd_flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether this pick task is part of a Direct Store Delivery (DSD) execution workflow (true = DSD, false = standard distribution).

attributes.name: exception_code
attributes.description: Code identifying any exception or issue encountered during task execution (e.g., short pick, damaged goods, location discrepancy). Null if no exception.

attributes.name: exception_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes entered by the operator or supervisor describing the exception or issue encountered during task execution.

attributes.name: gross_weight_kg
attributes.description: Total gross weight of the packed carton or pallet including product and packaging materials, measured in kilograms.

attributes.name: gs1_128_label
attributes.description: The GS1-128 barcode label data applied to the carton or pallet, encoding SSCC, GTIN, lot, expiry, and other supply chain attributes.

attributes.name: height_cm
attributes.description: Height dimension of the packed carton or pallet, measured in centimeters.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the pick task record was last updated in the WMS. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: length_cm
attributes.description: Length dimension of the packed carton or pallet, measured in centimeters.

attributes.name: net_weight_kg
attributes.description: Net weight of the product content only (excluding packaging), measured in kilograms.

attributes.name: otif_eligible_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: On Time In Full (OTIF) Eligible Flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether this pick task is subject to OTIF (On Time In Full) performance measurement (true = OTIF tracked, false = not tracked).

tag_set.value: On Time In Full (OTIF) Eligible Flag

attributes.name: pack_station_code
attributes.description: Reference to the packing station where the packing operation is performed. Applicable when task_type includes packing.

attributes.name: packaging_material_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the type of packaging material used (e.g., corrugated box, poly bag, shrink wrap). Used for cartonization and sustainability tracking.

attributes.name: pallet_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the pallet onto which cartons or items are loaded. Typically an SSCC or internal LPN.

attributes.name: pick_accuracy_flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether the pick was accurate (true = picked quantity matches requested quantity and correct SKU/lot; false = discrepancy detected).

attributes.name: pick_list_number
attributes.description: Human-readable pick list reference number assigned by the WMS for operator identification and tracking.

attributes.name: pick_quantity
attributes.description: The quantity of SKU units to be picked for this task, measured in the SKU's base unit of measure.

attributes.name: picked_quantity
attributes.description: The actual quantity of SKU units picked by the operator. May differ from pick_quantity due to short picks or overages.

attributes.name: picking_strategy
attributes.description: The picking methodology applied: discrete (single order), batch (multiple orders), zone (by warehouse zone), wave (grouped by wave), cluster (multi-order cart picking).

attributes.name: priority_level
attributes.description: Priority classification of the pick task for sequencing and resource allocation: urgent (immediate), high (expedited), normal (standard), low (backlog).

attributes.name: sscc
attributes.description: 18-digit GS1 Serial Shipping Container Code uniquely identifying the logistics unit (carton or pallet) for tracking through the supply chain.

attributes.name: task_assigned_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the pick task was assigned to an operator by the WMS. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: task_completed_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the pick task was completed and confirmed by the operator or WMS. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: task_duration_seconds
attributes.description: Total elapsed time in seconds from task start to completion. Used for labor productivity analysis and standard time calculation.

attributes.name: task_started_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the operator began executing the pick task (scanned start or confirmed task initiation). Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: task_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the pick task: pending (awaiting assignment), assigned (allocated to operator), in_progress (actively being executed), completed (finished successfully), cancelled (voided), on_hold (temporarily suspended).

attributes.name: task_type
attributes.description: Discriminator indicating the type of fulfillment task: pick (picking only), pack (packing only), pick_and_pack (combined operation), or replenishment_pick (internal stock movement).

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit of measure for pick and picked quantities (e.g., EA for each, CS for case, PL for pallet).

attributes.name: wave_code
attributes.description: Reference to the wave batch that groups multiple pick tasks for optimized execution. Supports wave picking strategy.

attributes.name: width_cm
attributes.description: Width dimension of the packed carton or pallet, measured in centimeters.

products.name: shipment
products.description: Outbound shipment dispatched from a distribution center to a customer/store. SSOT for DC-originated shipment records. Distinct from logistics.logistics_shipment which tracks carrier-level transport execution.
products.reference: Outbound Shipment / SAP SD Goods Issue

attributes.name: shipment_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the distribution shipment record. Primary key for the distribution shipment entity.

attributes.name: batch_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.batch_record. Business justification: Recall management and GMP regulatory compliance require direct batch-to-shipment traceability. Consumer goods regulators (FDA, EU GMP) mandate knowing which shipments distributed a specific manufactur

attributes.name: batch_release_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.batch_release. Business justification: GMP shipment compliance: finished goods shipments require confirmed batch release before dispatch. This FK links the shipment to its batch_release record, enabling pre-shipment quality gate checks, re

attributes.name: certificate_of_analysis_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.certificate_of_analysis. Business justification: CoA shipment documentation: consumer goods shipments (food, beverage, OTC, personal care) routinely require a Certificate of Analysis to accompany the delivery. This FK links the shipment to its CoA,

attributes.name: company_code_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Shipments in multi-entity consumer goods companies are posted under a company code for revenue recognition (goods issue) and intercompany billing. Required for statutory financial reporting and cross-

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Required for shipment cost allocation report; logistics expenses are charged to a cost center, a standard practice in consumer‑goods distribution.

attributes.name: manufacturing_facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.manufacturing_facility. Business justification: Shipment origin tracking: linking shipments to the originating manufacturing facility enables performance dashboards and OTIF analysis.

attributes.name: network_lane_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.network_lane. Business justification: Each distribution shipment travels a defined supply network lane. Linking shipments to network lanes enables lane performance analytics — actual vs. planned transit time, freight cost per lane, OTIF b

attributes.name: outbound_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.outbound_order. Business justification: Shipment is a child of an outbound order; each shipment fulfills an order. Adding outbound_order_id to distribution_shipment creates the necessary parent link without creating a bidirectional relation

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Freight cost and OTIF performance reporting in consumer goods requires shipment costs attributed to a profit center for channel/regional P&L. Distribution logistics costs must roll up to profit center

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.purchase_order. Business justification: OTIF reporting requires tying each shipment to its originating purchase order to measure delivery performance against contractual commitments.

attributes.name: replenishment_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.supply_replenishment_order. Business justification: Distribution shipments execute supply replenishment orders. Supply planners track in-transit shipment status against open replenishment orders for ATP updates and in-transit inventory visibility — a c

attributes.name: retail_store_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to sales.retail_store. Business justification: Shipment proof-of-delivery, store-level service metrics, and retail compliance reporting require linking each shipment to the destination retail store. Consumer goods logistics teams track on-time del

attributes.name: actual_delivery_timestamp
attributes.description: Actual date and time when the shipment was delivered and received at the destination. Used for final OTIF calculation.

attributes.name: actual_departure_timestamp
attributes.description: Actual date and time when the shipment departed the DC. Critical for OTIF calculation and carrier performance tracking.

attributes.name: bill_of_lading_number
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the bill of lading document issued by the carrier. Legal document for freight movement and proof of shipment.

attributes.name: carrier_service_level
attributes.description: Service tier selected for this shipment defining speed and handling requirements.

attributes.name: carton_count
attributes.description: Total number of cartons or cases included in the shipment. Used for piece-level tracking and receiving verification.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the shipment record was first created in the WMS. Audit trail for shipment lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: destination_address_line1
attributes.description: Primary street address line of the shipment destination. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: destination_city
attributes.description: City name of the shipment destination address.

attributes.name: destination_code
attributes.description: Business identifier of the destination location (store number, DC code, customer account number) where goods are being delivered.

attributes.name: destination_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code of the shipment destination for customs and routing purposes.

attributes.name: destination_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the destination location for display and confirmation purposes.

attributes.name: destination_postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code of the shipment destination. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.

attributes.name: destination_state_province
attributes.description: State or province code of the shipment destination address.

attributes.name: destination_type
attributes.description: Classification of the shipment destination entity type for routing and handling purposes.

attributes.name: dock_door_number
attributes.description: Identifier of the loading dock door at the source DC where the shipment was staged and loaded.

attributes.name: estimated_delivery_timestamp
attributes.description: Current estimated delivery date and time based on real-time tracking and carrier updates. Updated dynamically during transit.

attributes.name: freight_charge_amount
attributes.description: Total freight cost charged for this shipment in the transaction currency. Used for logistics cost analysis and freight audit.

attributes.name: freight_currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO currency code for the freight charge amount.

attributes.name: freight_terms
attributes.description: Terms defining which party is responsible for freight payment and at what point ownership transfers. Critical for cost allocation.

attributes.name: goods_issue_document_number
attributes.description: SAP SD goods issue document number linking the physical shipment to the ERP inventory transaction. Critical for inventory accuracy.

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether this shipment contains hazardous materials requiring special handling and documentation per DOT regulations.

attributes.name: in_full_flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether the shipment was delivered complete with all ordered quantities. Component of OTIF calculation.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the shipment record was last updated. Audit trail for change tracking and data freshness verification.

attributes.name: line_item_count
attributes.description: Total number of distinct SKU line items included in the shipment. Used for picking complexity and receiving planning.

attributes.name: load_number
attributes.description: Identifier of the load plan that consolidated multiple orders or shipments into this trailer. Used for load optimization tracking.

attributes.name: on_time_flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether the shipment was delivered within the committed delivery window. Component of OTIF calculation.

attributes.name: otif_status
attributes.description: Calculated OTIF performance status indicating whether the shipment was delivered on time and complete per customer commitment. Key supply chain KPI.

attributes.name: pallet_count
attributes.description: Total number of pallets included in the shipment. Used for handling unit tracking and dock labor planning.

attributes.name: pro_number
attributes.description: Carrier-assigned progressive number used for tracking and tracing the shipment in the carriers system.

attributes.name: scheduled_delivery_date
attributes.description: Planned date for the shipment to arrive at the destination. Used for customer commitment and OTIF measurement.

attributes.name: scheduled_delivery_timestamp
attributes.description: Planned date and time for the shipment to arrive at the destination. Precision timestamp for delivery window commitments.

attributes.name: scheduled_departure_timestamp
attributes.description: Planned date and time for the shipment to depart from the DC dock. Precision timestamp for appointment scheduling and carrier coordination.

attributes.name: scheduled_ship_date
attributes.description: Planned date for the shipment to depart from the distribution center. Used for OTIF performance measurement baseline.

attributes.name: seal_number
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the security seal applied to the trailer or container to ensure shipment integrity and prevent tampering.

attributes.name: shipment_number
attributes.description: Externally-known unique business identifier for the shipment assigned by the WMS. Used for tracking and reference across systems and with carriers.

attributes.name: shipment_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the shipment in the outbound fulfillment workflow. Tracks progression from planning through final delivery. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: planned|staged|loading|loaded|departed|in_transit|delivered|cancelled — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: shipment_type
attributes.description: Classification of the shipment based on delivery method and business purpose. DSD indicates Direct Store Delivery channel.

attributes.name: temperature_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether this shipment requires temperature-controlled transportation for product integrity.

attributes.name: total_units
attributes.description: Total quantity of individual sellable units (eaches) included in the shipment across all SKUs.

attributes.name: total_volume_cubic_meters
attributes.description: Total cube or volume of the shipment in cubic meters. Critical for trailer utilization and dimensional weight calculations.

attributes.name: total_weight_kg
attributes.description: Total gross weight of the shipment in kilograms including product and packaging. Used for freight rating and load planning.

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: Carrier-provided tracking identifier for real-time shipment visibility and customer self-service tracking.

attributes.name: trailer_number
attributes.description: Identifier of the trailer or container unit used to transport the shipment. Critical for load tracking and yard management.

attributes.name: wave_number
attributes.description: Identifier of the warehouse picking wave that generated the orders included in this shipment. Links shipment to WMS wave planning.

products.name: inventory_position
products.description: Current on-hand inventory position at the DC-location-SKU-lot level within distribution center walls. Captures storage location, SKU, lot number, manufacture and expiry dates, quantity on hand, allocated quantity, available-to-pick (ATP) quantity, quarantine quantity, inventory status (available, hold, damaged, expired), and last cycle count date. This is the operational working inventory view for DC execution — distinct from the inventory domain's network-wide planning position which aggregates across all nodes.
products.reference: WMS Stock Position / SAP WM Quant

attributes.name: inventory_position_id
attributes.description: Primary key for inventory_position

attributes.name: batch_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to manufacturing.batch_record. Business justification: Batch-level inventory management: consumer goods companies track on-hand inventory by manufacturing batch for FEFO rotation, shelf-life expiry management, and recall isolation. Linking inventory_posit

attributes.name: batch_release_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.batch_release. Business justification: Released inventory confirmation: in GMP consumer goods (OTC, supplements, cosmetics), inventory_position must reference its batch_release record to confirm the stock is quality-released and available

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Inventory carrying costs (storage, handling, cycle count labor) are allocated to cost centers in consumer goods management accounting. Linking inventory position to cost center enables inventory cost

attributes.name: distribution_facility_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the distribution center where the inventory is physically located.

attributes.name: inspection_lot_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: Inventory quarantine management: inventory_position tracks quantity_quarantine and quantity_hold. Linking to the active inspection_lot identifies WHY inventory is held, enabling warehouse teams to man

attributes.name: inventory_policy_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.inventory_policy. Business justification: Inventory policy governs reorder points, min/max levels, and replenishment methods for each SKU at a node. Linking inventory_position to inventory_policy enables automated replenishment triggering and

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Consumer goods companies allocate inventory value to profit centers for segment/brand P&L and working capital reporting. Inventory position by profit center is required for balance sheet inventory seg

attributes.name: safety_stock_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.safety_stock. Business justification: Inventory position must be compared against the safety stock target for each SKU/node to trigger replenishment alerts and measure stockout risk. This link enables real-time safety stock compliance mon

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the product SKU for which inventory position is tracked.

attributes.name: standard_cost_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.standard_cost. Business justification: Inventory valuation in consumer goods uses standard costs. Linking inventory_position to standard_cost enables real-time inventory value calculation (on_hand_quantity × standard cost) for balance shee

attributes.name: storage_location_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Storage Location Dc Location Id (Foreign Key)
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.distribution_storage_location. Business justification: Inventory position records on‑hand quantities at a specific DC location. Linking to distribution_storage_location provides the authoritative location details and removes the generic storage_location_i

tag_set.value: Storage Location Dc Location Id (Foreign Key)

attributes.name: actual_weight
attributes.description: The actual measured weight of the inventory for catch weight items. Used for billing and compliance when item weight varies.

attributes.name: catch_weight_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the SKU is a catch weight item requiring actual weight capture at transaction time (true) or standard weight (false).

attributes.name: cost_per_unit
attributes.description: The unit cost of the inventory lot. Used for inventory valuation and cost of goods sold calculations. Business confidential financial data.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this inventory position record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for inventory valuation (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

attributes.name: days_on_hand
attributes.description: The number of days the inventory has been on hand since receipt. Calculated as current date minus receipt date. Used for aging analysis.

attributes.name: days_to_expiry
attributes.description: The number of days remaining until the inventory lot expires. Calculated as expiry date minus current date. Critical for FEFO rotation and markdown decisions.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: The date on which the product lot expires and can no longer be sold or distributed. Critical for FEFO inventory management and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: inventory_condition
attributes.description: The physical condition classification of the inventory. Used for disposition decisions and channel restrictions.

attributes.name: inventory_status
attributes.description: The current operational status of the inventory position. Determines availability for picking and order fulfillment.

attributes.name: last_cycle_count_date
attributes.description: The date when this inventory position was last physically counted during a cycle count operation. Used to schedule next count and assess inventory accuracy.

attributes.name: last_movement_date
